Content: Schafer: Oh, Brad is out. Okay.
Content_zh: Schafer：喔，Brad 不在。好。

Content: Hello everybody.
Content_zh: 大家好。

Content: Hi. It's good to see you.
Content_zh: 嗨，很高興見到你。

Content: Hello. Thank you for coming.
Content_zh: 哈囉，謝謝你們來。

Content: So, uh, it's Monday, and Friday was terrible.
Content_zh: 今天是星期一，而上星期五真的很糟。

Content: Uh, all of you were here.
Content_zh: 呃，你們當時都在。

Content: I want to just think everyone for, uh, showing so much class
Content_zh: 我想謝謝大家，呃，那天表現得那麼有風度，

Content: going through that difficult day.
Content_zh: 一起度過那個艱難的日子。

Content: You guys all, um, uh, held together nicely.
Content_zh: 大家都，嗯，撐得很好。

Content: It was a rough day on everybody and, um, I think you showed a lot of compassion
Content_zh: 那天對每個人都很難熬，嗯，我覺得大家展現了很多同理心，

Content: for the people who are leaving and also understanding for those of us who had to make that decision,
Content_zh: 給那些要離開的人，也體諒我們這些不得不做出決定的人，

Content: and it really helped us get through it.
Content_zh: 這真的幫助我們撐了過來。

Content: And we will--we are getting through it, and it's, um...
Content_zh: 我們會……我們會熬過去的……

Content: Now we have a bunch of games we gotta make and stuff to do.
Content_zh: 現在我們還有一堆遊戲要做、一堆事情要忙。

Content: Um, we are still helping the people who need letters of reference,
Content_zh: 嗯，我們還在幫需要推薦信的人，

Content: letters of recommendation, stuff like that.
Content_zh: 像推薦信之類的。

Content: Help--doing what we can to get them set up with new engagements.
Content_zh: 盡我們所能幫他們找到新的工作機會。

Content: Um, but other than that, we here are still working on these games.
Content_zh: 嗯，但除此之外，留下來的我們還是要繼續做這些遊戲。

Content: Did you want to talk about the layoffs?
Content_zh: 你想談談裁員的事嗎？

Content: -Is that part of the documentary?
Content_zh: 那是紀錄片的一部分嗎？

Content: Talk about the layoffs. I'm gonna have a drink.
Content_zh: 說到裁員的事，我要喝一杯。

Content: Can I drink on camera?
Content_zh: 我能在攝影機上喝酒嗎？

Content: If the kids are watchin' this, kids, don't drink.
Content_zh: 如果有小朋友在看，小朋友，不要喝酒。

Content: A week ago, we had a project canceled, an unannounced project from a publisher
Content_zh: 一週前，我們有個專案被取消，是一個發行商委託、尚未公開的專案，

Content: that really liked the game.
Content_zh: 而且他們其實很喜歡那款遊戲。

Content: We had just done our vertical slice and then gave us great feedback on it
Content_zh: 我們才剛做完 vertical slice，他們也給了很好的回饋，

Content: and they said it was great and they really liked it.
Content_zh: 他們說很棒，也真的很喜歡。

Content: And then the next call was they're canceling it for higher-up reasons.
Content_zh: 結果下一通電話就說，因為高層因素，他們要取消。

Content: Well, that was a big project that was funding a lot of people.
Content_zh: 那是個大專案，支撐著很多人的薪水。

Content: And--and then another one of our publishers from another project is having financial problems
Content_zh: 然後我們另一個專案的發行商也遇到財務問題，

Content: and can't pay us.
Content_zh: 也付不出錢給我們。

Content: Bailey: You know, it's public news now that Majesco is, um...
Content_zh: Bailey：Majesco 是……

Content: Pardon me.
Content_zh: 抱歉。

Content: Not timed there.
Content_zh: 時間點真不巧。

Content: Majesco has made a public statement that
Content_zh: Majesco 公開宣佈：

Content: their, you know, continued ability to perform as--as a going concern is at stake and, of course,
Content_zh: 他們，你知道，能不能繼續營運都成了問題，當然，

Content: we did Costume Quest 2 with them and the payments were not complete for that.
Content_zh: 我們和他們一起做了《Costume Quest 2》，但款項還沒付清。

Content: So we're actually-- we're owed money by Majesco that we're not getting paid.
Content_zh: 所以其實 Majesco 欠我們錢，而我們現在拿不到。

Content: And then, of course Costume Quest 2, um, because of that statement, you can infer
Content_zh: 當然，《Costume Quest 2》也因為那份聲明，你可以推斷，

Content: that it's not being marketed properly and it's not being distributed to its fullest extent
Content_zh: 它沒有被好好行銷，也沒有得到應有的完整發行，

Content: that you would expect from a publisher, because there-- you know, the means and the people there to do that
Content_zh: 不像你會期待發行商做到的那樣，因為他們那邊，你知道，已經沒有資源和人手，

Content: just don't exist anymore.
Content_zh: 只是不再存在。

Content: Um, so it's kind of a perfect storm.
Content_zh: 嗯，所以有點像所有壞事同時發生。

Content: It was a bad week to put it mildly.
Content_zh: 保守地說，那是很糟的一週。

Content: So, glad that week's over.
Content_zh: 所以，很高興那一週過去了。

Content: If that publisher hadn't canceled it, you know, things would have been--
Content_zh: 如果那個發行商沒有取消，你知道，事情本來會……

Content: were looking really good for the studio.
Content_zh: 工作室的狀況本來看起來很不錯。

Content: Um, I think things are still looking really good for the studio,
Content_zh: 嗯，我覺得工作室現在其實仍然很有前景，

Content: but only because we took quick action.
Content_zh: 但那是因為我們行動得很快。

Content: Schafer: So we had to let go of 12 people.
Content_zh: Schafer：所以我們不得不裁掉 12 個人。

Content: Some of them, uh, had been here for a short period of time and some of them had been here for a long period of time,
Content_zh: 有些人，呃，在這裡待的時間不長，有些人則待了很久，

Content: over ten years.
Content_zh: 超過十年。

Content: So that was really hard.
Content_zh: 所以那真的很難。

Content: Stoddard: What do you want to know, how I feel about them and-- Off camera: Yeah, yeah, how was it? I mean you--
Content_zh: Stoddard：你想知道什麼？我對他們的感覺，還是…… 畫外音：對，對，感覺怎麼樣？我是說你……

Content: Stoddard: It was horrible. -Yeah.
Content_zh: Stoddard：太可怕了。-對。

Content: It was really horrible. Um...
Content_zh: 真的很可怕。嗯……

Content: I mean, I understand why it happened, but, like, we--the audio team was super tight, uh,
Content_zh: 我是說，我明白為什麼會發生，但我們……音效團隊本來非常緊密，呃，

Content: and now there's two of us instead of four.
Content_zh: 現在只剩我們兩個，而不是四個人。

Content: Um, it was a heavy hit.
Content_zh: 嗯，這打擊很沉重。

Content: The day of the layoffs were just brutal.
Content_zh: 裁員那天真的很殘酷。

Content: Kipnis: Uh, well, I will say that the layoffs-- I wasn't actually at the office when it happened, so...
Content_zh: Kipnis：呃，好吧，我會說裁員……我其實不是在辦公室，所以……

Content: And, um, at first, like, I--I got-- I got text messages about it
Content_zh: 一開始我收到一些簡訊，

Content: and it was, uh...
Content_zh: 而且……

Content: it was really tough to--to hear about it, um, and it--it was tough to, like, not be here to say goodbye
Content_zh: 聽到這件事真的很難受，嗯，而且不能在這裡跟他們道別也很難受，

Content: to some of those people that I've worked with for years and years
Content_zh: 跟一些我共事了很多很多年的人道別，

Content: and, like, you know, I'm gonna miss a lot.
Content_zh: 而且，你知道，我會很想念很多人。

Content: I don't know what else to say.
Content_zh: 我不知道還能說什麼。

Content: Crook: And you always feel a little bit guilty when you're still here, you know, and other people aren't,
Content_zh: Crook：當你還留在這裡，而其他人不在了，總會有一點罪惡感，

Content: um, and it hurts morale quite a bit, um, but...
Content_zh: 嗯，士氣確實受到很大打擊，嗯，不過……

Content: but I know that it--I know that it was not taken lightly.
Content_zh: 但我知道……我知道這不是草率做出的決定。

Content: Hansen: It was the hardest day of my life.
Content_zh: Hansen：那是我人生中最難熬的一天。

Content: I never thought we would be in that situation, but project cancelations happen and, you know,
Content_zh: 我從沒想過我們會碰到那種狀況，但專案被取消就是會發生，你知道，

Content: sometimes you can absorb it and sometimes you can't.
Content_zh: 有時候你能消化這種衝擊，有時候不行。

Content: So Tim and I almost avoided each other just 'cause we knew that we had to meet and talk about that.
Content_zh: 所以 Tim 和我幾乎都在躲著彼此，因為我們知道得見面談這件事。

Content: And I didn't want to, and he didn't want to either.
Content_zh: 我不想談，他也不想。

Content: There was no, like, oh, yeah, it's so easy, it's person X, Y, and Z.
Content_zh: 不是那種「喔，對，很簡單，就是 X、Y、Z 這幾個人」的狀況。

Content: It's like every single one of those people are-- they're huge contributors to all these games we've made.
Content_zh: 就像那些人每一個……他們都為我們做過的這些遊戲貢獻很大。

Content: They're the people we hang out with after work and so-- And, you know, and it's tough for Double Fine in general,
Content_zh: 他們是下班後會一起混的人，所以……而且，你知道，這對 Double Fine 整體來說也很難，

Content: because historically, I mean, we even said this in the media in the past,
Content_zh: 因為從公司歷史來看，我們以前甚至在媒體上說過，

Content: we don't do layoffs and that sort of thing.
Content_zh: 我們不裁員，不做那種事。

Content: It was--it was a tough decision for sure.
Content_zh: 那……那肯定是個很難的決定。

Content: Russell: A lot of us just stayed afterwards in the room, after we were told, and just talked about
Content_zh: Russell：後來我們很多人聽完消息後，就留在房間裡聊了起來，

Content: the history of the company, and just, we were like, we couldn't believe this happened to us,
Content_zh: 公司的歷史，然後我們都覺得，真的不敢相信這件事會發生在我們身上，

Content: but you know, in the game industry and in any entertainment industry,
Content_zh: 但你知道，在遊戲業，或任何娛樂產業裡，

Content: it's--it's the norm.
Content_zh: 這……這就是常態。

Content: We're the exception, so in that respect I-- I--I feel lucky,
Content_zh: 我們才是例外，所以就這點來說，我……我覺得自己很幸運，

Content: and we'll survive, a little bit smaller, a little leaner, but we'll make it.
Content_zh: 我們會撐下去，只是規模小一點、精簡一點，但我們會做到。

Content: [Music] Schafer: So basically we are powering forward on our, um,
Content_zh: [音樂] Schafer：所以基本上，我們正在全力推進，嗯，

Content: uh, remaining titles that we're working on.
Content_zh: 呃，我們手上剩下正在做的作品。

Content: Those are the stories I really wanted to make the documentary about
Content_zh: 那些才是我真正想讓紀錄片拍下來的故事，

Content: but we could never do that, like, those publisher games,
Content_zh: 但我們以前永遠不能拍，像那些發行商專案，

Content: to see, like, what it's like, all those meetings where they're saying,
Content_zh: 看看那到底是什麼樣子，像那些會議裡他們說，

Content: "This game is so great, we can't wait to see it." And then the meeting where they actually said it's canceled,
Content_zh: 「這遊戲太棒了，我們等不及想看到。」然後下一場會議他們卻真的說取消，

Content: we have to cancel it, but I hope you still make it 'cause I really want to play it.
Content_zh: 我們得取消它，但我希望你們還是做出來，因為我真的很想玩。

Content: That was an actual quote from the guy, he was like, "If you make it
Content_zh: 那真的是那個人的原話，他說：「如果你們做出來，

Content: I really want to play it." It's like, "Oh, thanks, that makes up
Content_zh: 我真的很想玩。」感覺就像：「喔，謝了，這樣就彌補了，

Content: for me laying off 12 people.
Content_zh: 我裁掉 12 個人的事。」

Content: That--I totally feel good now that you want to play this game
Content_zh: 「你想玩這款遊戲，這樣……我現在完全好受多了，

Content: that you just killed." But, um, since I'm mostly fueled by angriness and bitterness,
Content_zh: 這款被你親手殺掉的遊戲。」不過，嗯，既然我主要是靠憤怒和怨念驅動，

Content: then I'm stronger than ever right now.
Content_zh: 那我現在比以往更強。

Content: You know, whatever works.
Content_zh: 你知道，有用就好。

Content: [Music] [Chatter]
Content_zh: [音樂] [交談聲]

Content: Schafer: Oh god, is that thing still here? Mitchell: It's way funnier now.
Content_zh: Schafer：天啊，那東西還在嗎？Mitchell：現在更好笑了。

Content: Muir: It was just sad. Mitchell: Yeah.
Content_zh: Muir：那只是很悲傷。Mitchell：對。

Content: Muir: It wasn't bad. Mitchell: No.
Content_zh: Muir：不算糟。Mitchell：不會。

Content: Schafer: That one that you found under the sink?
Content_zh: Schafer：你在水槽下面找到的那個？

Content: Muir: It's really good. It's like, uh...
Content_zh: Muir：真的很棒，就像……

Content: Mitchell: It's gooey, though.
Content_zh: Mitchell：不過它黏黏的。

Content: Muir: Chipotle.
Content_zh: Muir：Chipotle。

Content: Schafer: Is everyone here?
Content_zh: Schafer：大家都在嗎？

Content: [Murmuring] Hello, everybody! Hello.
Content_zh: [低語聲] 大家好！哈囉。

Content: And thank you for coming back to work here again for another year.
Content_zh: 謝謝大家新的一年又回來這裡工作。

Content: It's awesome to see you all here.
Content_zh: 看到大家都在這裡真好。

Content: Welcome back.
Content_zh: 歡迎回來。

Content: Nice to see you all.
Content_zh: 很高興見到大家。

Content: Rice: Yeah, man.
Content_zh: Rice：是啊，老兄。

Content: Schafer: 2015. Wait a second.
Content_zh: Schafer：2015 年。等一下。

Content: Does that mean we didn't finish in December?
Content_zh: 那意味著我們十二月沒結束嗎？

Content: Rice: Yeah.
Content_zh: Rice：是啊。

Content: Comin' on three years.
Content_zh: 快滿三年了。

Content: Schafer: Three--no kidding? It's like Rip Van Winkle.
Content_zh: Schafer：三年……真的假的？簡直像 Rip Van Winkle。

Content: All I remember is the Kickstarter, and then I woke up and it's three years later.
Content_zh: 我只記得 Kickstarter，然後一醒來就已經三年後了。

Content: Crook: And we all have big, long--and we all have big, long beards.
Content_zh: Crook：我們都有又大又長的……我們都有又大又長的鬍子。

Content: Schafer: Yeah, we're just here with beards.
Content_zh: Schafer：對，我們就這樣留著鬍子坐在這裡。

Content: Ray, where did all that money go, what?
Content_zh: Ray，那些錢都跑去哪了，蛤？

Content: I guess we should ship this game.
Content_zh: 我想我們該把這遊戲推出去了。

Content: But the game was awesome.
Content_zh: 但這遊戲很棒。

Content: Um, but, um, but we-- I think I'm trying to this week still keep play testing,
Content_zh: 嗯，不過，嗯，我們……我想這週還是要繼續 playtest，

Content: especially the problem areas in the game where people get hung up the most
Content_zh: 尤其是遊戲裡玩家最容易卡住的問題區域，

Content: and catch any remaining dialogue.
Content_zh: 也抓出任何還缺的台詞。

Content: There's probably some object interactions or examine lines that are still missing that I would love to catch.
Content_zh: 可能還有一些物件互動或查看台詞漏掉了，我很想把它們抓出來。

Content: Please keep talking and don't be freaked out that we're not answering you, 'cause we'd just like
Content_zh: 請繼續講，不要因為我們沒回應就緊張，因為我們只是想

Content: to hear what you're thinking.
Content_zh: 聽聽你在想什麼。

Content: Miller: All right.
Content_zh: Miller：好。

Content: I'm already baffled.
Content_zh: 我已經搞不懂了。

Content: Vella: Is this one?
Content_zh: Vella：是這個嗎？

Content: Miller: This must be incredibly fun to watch.
Content_zh: Miller：這看起來一定超有趣。

Content: Schafer: We're not even here.
Content_zh: Schafer：我們甚至不在這裡。

Content: Miller: What's that? You're not paying attention?
Content_zh: Miller：什麼？你們沒在注意嗎？

Content: Schafer: Yeah, I'm doing my taxes over here.
Content_zh: Schafer：對，我在旁邊報稅。

Content: Miller: I think I'll switch to Shay 'cause I can't figure this out.
Content_zh: Miller：我想我改玩 Shay 好了，因為我搞不懂這裡。

Content: Schafer: I mean, it's--it--that-- the first puzzle, it's, like, one of the first puzzles that Vella has,
Content_zh: Schafer：我是說，那個……那個第一個謎題，那算是 Vella 最早遇到的謎題之一，

Content: and you have to do something and get this visual feedback, and you have to mess with it a lot and get some more feedback
Content_zh: 你得做點事情、得到視覺回饋，然後反覆嘗試、再得到更多回饋，

Content: to kind of figure out the patterns.
Content_zh: 好找出模式。

Content: Um, and then it's just a problem of, like, have we kind of inceptioned? Is that a verb?
Content_zh: 嗯，然後問題就是，我們是不是有點 inception 了？這能當動詞嗎？

Content: Put the idea in the player's head of what they want to do enough.
Content_zh: 有沒有把玩家該做什麼的想法，充分種進他們腦中。

Content: 'Cause sometimes you just mess with the game and you just kind of bang on it
Content_zh: 因為有時候你只是亂碰遊戲、一路硬試，

Content: and you--woo, you solved it, you don't really know how you solved it.
Content_zh: 你……你解開了，但其實不知道自己是怎麼解開的。

Content: And that to me is almost a worst-case scenario.
Content_zh: 對我來說，這幾乎是最糟的情況。

Content: That's almost worse than getting stuck forever, you know?
Content_zh: 這甚至比永遠卡住還糟，你懂嗎？

Content: Like, getting-- 'cause being stuck forever, if you finally solve it you feel great.
Content_zh: 因為如果是一直卡關，最後解開時你會覺得很爽。

Content: But if you solve it in accident, you're like, I don't know what just happened, you move on
Content_zh: 但如果你是意外解開的，就會覺得「我剛剛根本不知道發生什麼」，然後繼續往前，

Content: and you kind of get this kind of bored feeling.
Content_zh: 你就會有點無聊。

Content: And it's really easy to just accidently put this one line in
Content_zh: 真的很容易不小心放進一句台詞，

Content: that makes everybody just know what to do immediately.
Content_zh: 讓所有人立刻知道該怎麼做。

Content: So it's--it's like a lot of-- 'cause time--time is short and we don't have much-- we don't have much time left,
Content_zh: 所以……因為時間很緊，我們剩下的時間不多了，

Content: and to solve these problems, to make sure that everyone gets through the game,
Content_zh: 為了解決這些問題，確保每個人都能玩完整款遊戲，

Content: it's really tempting to just kind of, like, short circuit all the puzzles and make sure
Content_zh: 真的很容易會想乾脆把所有謎題都簡化掉，確保

Content: that everybody can get through them.
Content_zh: 大家都能過關。

Content: But you have to kind of take a lot of time to actually really look, um, carefully at, like,
Content_zh: 但你得花不少時間，真正仔細看清楚

Content: each mental leap the player is making.
Content_zh: 玩家每一步推理上的跳躍。

Content: [Off camera] If people were saying the first one was too easy and you're taking out a lot of the hints,
Content_zh: [畫外音] 如果大家都說第一幕太簡單，而你又拿掉很多提示，

Content: I mean, are you afraid you went too far in the other direction?
Content_zh: 我是說，你會擔心自己往另一個方向走太遠嗎？

Content: -It seems like there's a lot-- Schafer: Well, I'm hoping-- I'm hoping we went way too far.
Content_zh: -看起來好像有很多……Schafer：嗯，我希望……我希望我們真的走太遠了。

Content: Rice: But yeah, like Tim said, in general I think we're gonna keep play testing
Content_zh: Rice：但對，就像 Tim 說的，整體來說，我想我們會繼續做 playtest，

Content: in hopes that anything that we find that is a problem
Content_zh: 希望之後找到的任何問題

Content: down the road could be changed.
Content_zh: 都還可以修改。

Content: Crook: Are we gonna have-- with--with Ben leaving, are we having any other-- another GP coming on
Content_zh: Crook：Ben 要離開了，我們會不會再找另一個 GP 加進來，

Content: or are we gonna be able to just absorb?
Content_zh: 還是我們可以自己消化掉？

Content: Peck: Um, well, it's my second to last day here at Double Fine.
Content_zh: Peck：嗯，今天是我在 Double Fine 的倒數第二天。

Content: And, uh, just trying to, like, put a bow on as many things as I could before leaving.
Content_zh: 呃，就是想在離開前，盡量把能收尾的事情都收好。

Content: The place I'm going to is quite a bit-- it's like a larger company so...
Content_zh: 我要去的是一間大不少的公司，所以……

Content: I'm--yeah, I'm gonna miss the...
Content_zh: 是的，我會想念……

Content: like, the small little scenes at the lunch table or, like, company meetings and stuff like that
Content_zh: 像午餐桌旁那些小場面，或公司會議之類，

Content: where, like, it's okay to make a dick joke or, like, it's okay to...
Content_zh: 那種可以講黃色笑話、或是……

Content: to just kind of be yourself a bit.
Content_zh: 可以稍微做自己的地方。

Content: Um...
I'm hoping I can kind of take a little bit of that for-- like, with me wherever I go, you know?
Content_zh: 我希望不管去到哪裡，都能把一點那樣的氣氛帶著走，你懂嗎？

Content: I feel bad I'm not gonna be there for, like, when the shit inevitably hits the fan, you know,
Content_zh: 想到事情不可避免地爆炸時我不會在場，我有點過意不去，

Content: and the game needs to be finaled.
Content_zh: 這款遊戲又需要收尾定稿。

Content: Kipnis: That jerk.
Content_zh: Kipnis：那個混蛋。

Content: No, I mean, it sucks.
Content_zh: 沒有啦，我是說，這真的很糟。

Content: It sucks. I mean, Ben--Ben contributed a lot to the--to the game and, you know, we're--
Content_zh: 糟透了。我的意思是，Ben……Ben 對這款遊戲貢獻很大。你知道，我們……

Content: we're having to kind of figure out some stuff in the code that he wrote when he could have been here to help us out.
Content_zh: 我們得自己摸索他寫的程式碼裡的一些東西，本來他人在的話可以幫忙。

Content: I mean, it sucks, but, um, we'll just have to finish without him, you know?
Content_zh: 我是說，這很糟，但我們只能在沒有他的情況下把它做完，你懂嗎？

Content: Crook: I mean, I will say, you know, we've had to transition because, um, Lee left the project
Content_zh: Crook：我是說，我們確實經歷了一段轉換期，因為 Lee 離開了專案，

Content: and, um, that was-- that was scary, um, because he--he seemed to know
Content_zh: 那真的很可怕，因為他似乎知道

Content: what was going on with everything.
Content_zh: 所有事情是怎麼運作的。

Content: And so I think Anna's had to take on a lot of some of the responsibilities that Lee had, um,
Content_zh: 所以我覺得 Anna 必須接下很多 Lee 原本負責的事，嗯，

Content: as far as puzzle chains and--and how those are all put together
Content_zh: 至於謎題鏈，以及那些東西是怎麼串在一起的，

Content: and--and the logic.
Content_zh: 還有背後的邏輯。

Content: Um, so I'm sure that's been stressful for her.
Content_zh: 嗯，所以我很確定那對她壓力很大。

Content: [Offscreen] Do you regret not getting to see Broken Age through to the end?
Content_zh: [畫外音] 你後悔沒有看到《Broken Age》到最後嗎？

Content: Petty: Yeah, you know, I'm trying to think.
Content_zh: Petty：是啊，你知道，我在思考。

Content: I think this is the only time I haven't stayed on a project
Content_zh: 我覺得這是我唯一一次沒有待在一個專案上，

Content: all the way through.
Content_zh: 一路做到最後。

Content: It was a lot of those, um, small decisions right at the end of the project
Content_zh: 那是在專案最後階段做出的很多小決定，

Content: that have a big impact on the game 'cause all the content's there
Content_zh: 卻會對遊戲造成很大的影響，因為內容都已經在那裡了，

Content: and it's all connected.
Content_zh: 而且全都串起來了。

Content: And sometimes just pushing and pulling a few things
Content_zh: 有時候只是稍微推拉幾個地方，

Content: can--it, um, can really help the game, and it's nice to be part of that.
Content_zh: 就能……就能真的幫到遊戲，而能參與其中也很好。

Content: But, uh, I don't think I'll be part of that for Act 2 anyways, but--
Content_zh: 但我想不管怎樣，我應該不會參與第二幕了，不過……

Content: I think I'm--I'm excited for Act 2 to come out, because I think Act 1 had a lot of great things about it
Content_zh: 我很期待第二幕推出，因為我覺得第一幕有很多很棒的地方，

Content: but it was incomplete, and, you know, you can sort of see the whole arc or play the whole game,
Content_zh: 但它畢竟不完整。等你能看到完整弧線、玩完整款遊戲，

Content: might get a better sense of whether that was successful or not.
Content_zh: 應該會更能判斷它到底成不成功。

Content: But hopefully I've helped set that up, um, to be a--to be a great experience.
Content_zh: 但希望我已經幫它打好基礎，讓它能成為很棒的體驗。

Content: Schafer: But we don't need anybody.
Content_zh: Schafer：但我們不需要任何人。

Content: Broken Age team.
Content_zh: 《Broken Age》團隊。

Content: We don't-- we don't need nobody.
Content_zh: 我們不需要任何人。

Content: We'll finish it ourselves.
Content_zh: 我們會自己完成。

Content: So where are we supposed to be right now, Alpha on the finale?
Content_zh: 所以我們現在應該做到哪裡？結尾段要到 Alpha 了嗎？

Content: Rice: Yeah. You wanna look at the...
Content_zh: Rice：是啊。 你想看看……

Content: Schafer: When is beta on B2 and G2? Is that there?
Content_zh: Schafer：B2 和 G2 的 Beta 是什麼時候？有在上面嗎？

Content: Rice: Yeah, so we'll show you the timeline as it is right now.
Content_zh: Rice：對，所以我們會讓你看目前的時間線。

Content: Um, but Matt and Vic and I, and Malena are gonna meet this afternoon now, uh,
Content_zh: Matt、Vic、Malena 和我今天下午要開會，

Content: and want to get a lot more clarity into just closing out the project,
Content_zh: 想把專案收尾的事情釐清得更清楚一點，

Content: but also, like, these beta sprints and--and things like that as well.
Content_zh: 還有這些 Beta sprint 之類的事。

Content: Hansen: Right now there's a tendency for people to gravitate towards whatever is the, you know,
Content_zh: Hansen：現在大家有一種傾向，會被當下看起來最……

Content: maybe the most interesting work, and that's not-- might not be the most, uh, highest priority work.
Content_zh: 也許是最有趣的工作，但那不一定是優先級最高的工作。

Content: We just need to do some load balancing and some estimates as far as, like, how long is it gonna take
Content_zh: 我們只是需要做一點人力調配和時程估算，像是還要多久

Content: to get this shit done, 'cause people-- if people don't tell us that,
Content_zh: 才能把這些東西做完，因為如果大家不告訴我們，

Content: we might be fucked already and we don't even know it.
Content_zh: 我們可能已經完蛋了，自己還不知道。

Content: Rice: Um, but, yes, Ray, you're correct.
Content_zh: Rice：嗯，但是，是的，Ray，你是對的。

Content: The, um, the right reaction to this is, it's a lot to do in two-- in two months and change.
Content_zh: 嗯，對，Ray，你說得沒錯。這件事的正常反應就是：兩個多月內要做的事很多。

Content: Crook: Yeah. Rice: So, um, I think that's why we wanted to make sure that these dates
Content_zh: Crook：對。Rice：所以，嗯，我想這就是為什麼我們要確保這些日期

Content: get in front of everybody's eyes and that people are looking at it differently.
Content_zh: 攤在大家眼前，讓大家用不同角度去看。

Content: Hansen: Is it reasonable? I mean, or are you-- or you're like, I don't know, man,
Content_zh: Hansen：這合理嗎？還是你覺得……我不知道，老兄，

Content: 'cause your gut checks are usually pretty good.
Content_zh: 因為你的直覺通常很準。

Content: Crook: Wow.
Content_zh: Crook：哇。

Content: Yeah, but I think it's-- I think it'd be all right.
Content_zh: 對，但我覺得……我覺得應該沒問題。

Content: Do you think the GPs are gonna be--I mean, 'cause there was a time where
Content_zh: 你覺得 GP 們會不會……我是說，因為曾經有一段時間，

Content: there were gonna be four of them.
Content_zh: 本來會有四個人。

Content: Now there's two of them.
Content_zh: 現在只剩兩個。

Content: Rice: We're getting all the box stuff ready to go and actually manufacturing in, like, February, um,
Content_zh: Rice：我們正在把所有盒裝相關的東西準備好，實際上大概二月就要開始製造，嗯，

Content: to where discs would be pressed in mid-March.
Content_zh: 到三月中旬就會壓製光碟。

Content: Kipnis: Yeah, and the game--does the game run on the PS4?
Content_zh: Kipnis：對，而且遊戲……遊戲能在 PS4 上跑嗎？

Content: Franzke: Nope. Kipnis: Yeah.
Content_zh: Franzke：不能。Kipnis：對。

Content: And--and I think it's really important to have a, "Okay, Tim, this is it, like, you can't..."
Content_zh: 而且我覺得設一個「好，Tim，到此為止，你不能再……」的時間點很重要。

Content: Hansen: Yeah. Kipnis: Like, absolute content complete from, like, Tim content complete maybe.
Content_zh: Hansen：對。Kipnis：像是絕對內容完成，或者說 Tim 內容完成。

Content: Hansen: Last call for alcohol.
Content_zh: Hansen：酒吧最後點單。

Content: Kipnis: Yeah, last call.
Content_zh: Kipnis：對，最後點單。

Content: Let's just call it that, last call.
Content_zh: 就叫它那個吧，last call。

Content: It's really hard to, as a creator, to turn yourself off.
Content_zh: 身為創作者，要讓自己停下來真的很難。

Content: What I want to do is be able to account for that and I want Tim to be able to do that.
Content_zh: 我想做的是把這件事納入考量，也希望 Tim 能做到。

Content: I want him to be able to, like, "Oh, God, this is it, that's right,
Content_zh: 我希望他可以說：「天啊，就是這裡了，對，

Content: I can't add anymore after this." And I want him to be able to, like, have that time
Content_zh: 這之後不能再加了。」我希望他能有那段時間，

Content: and account for it in our--in our milestone, like, timeline and stuff.
Content_zh: 並把它算進我們的里程碑、時程之類的安排裡。

Content: Because I want him to be, like, happy with what we come up with.
Content_zh: 因為我希望他能對我們最後做出來的東西感到滿意。

Content: Because we know his creative process, it's important for us to schedule it appropriately.
Content_zh: 因為我們知道他的創作流程，所以把它妥善排進時程很重要。

Content: Rice: Yeah, um... Kipnis: Yeah, I didn't realize, like, how soon the beta was.
Content_zh: Rice：對，嗯……Kipnis：對，我沒意識到 Beta 這麼快就到了。

Content: Jesus Christ. Rice: Yeah, and I don't know, Matt, like, right now every-- there's a lot of hands on Grim,
Content_zh: 老天。Rice：對，而且我不知道，Matt，現在很多人都在忙《Grim Fandango》，

Content: but, like, obviously that's just a near-term problem that's being solved soon.
Content_zh: 但那顯然只是近期問題，很快就會解決。

Content: But after that, um, yeah, I don't know what kind of, uh, strings
Content_zh: 但之後，嗯，對，我不知道我們到時候能不能

Content: we can pull with people on other teams, um, as needed.
Content_zh: 視需要去調動其他團隊的人手。

Content: Hansen: They can't. I mean, we have milestones. We won't get paid.
Content_zh: Hansen：他們不能。我是說，我們有里程碑。拿不到里程碑款的話，

Content: If we don't get paid then the studio shuts down.
Content_zh: 如果我們拿不到錢，工作室就得關門。

Content: Rice: That's what I thought.
Content_zh: Rice：我也是這麼想。

Content: So I was just making sure that that was the case.
Content_zh: 所以我只是確認一下是不是這樣。

Content: Hansen: I'm just gonna be totally blunt with you guys, but you can't touch (redacted).
Content_zh: Hansen：我就直接跟你們說，你們不能動（已刪節）。

Content: Kipnis: Yeah. Hansen: I'm sorry.
Content_zh: Kipnis：對。Hansen：抱歉。

Content: Franzke: Yeah.
Content_zh: Franzke：是啊。

Content: All right. Rice: Cool.
Content_zh: 好。Rice：酷。

Content: Franzke: Let's make this happen, huh?
Content_zh: Franzke：那就把它做成吧，好嗎？

Content: Rice: Yeah. All right.
Content_zh: Rice：對。好。

Content: Like, you guys are the right people to ask about this.
Content_zh: 你們正是該被問這件事的人。

Content: Like what--what does gut say about the timeline?
Content_zh: 你們直覺上覺得這個時程怎麼樣？

Content: It's basically two months till pencils down.
Content_zh: 距離收手大概只剩兩個月。

Content: Inversin: I'm not totally scared just yet, but I might be terrified.
Content_zh: Inversin：我現在還沒有完全害怕，但可能快嚇死了。

Content: We'll see.
Content_zh: 再看看吧。

Content: [Offscreen] Did you get to learn anything from Lydia when she was still here?
Content_zh: [畫外音] 你從莉蒂亞那學到什麼了嗎？

Content: Panya: No.
Content_zh: Panya：沒有。

Content: She had a lot of the Act 1 shader stuff, so, like, her signature's over everything
Content_zh: 第一幕很多 shader 都是她做的，所以到處都有她留下的痕跡，

Content: so I can pick up where she left off in that sense.
Content_zh: 這樣至少我能接著她留下來的部分繼續做。

Content: Uh, but she's not here for me to kind of ask questions.
Content_zh: 呃，但她不在這裡，我沒辦法問她問題。

Content: Scheduling with effects is always kind of scary, 'cause there's always this, you know,
Content_zh: 排特效時程總是有點可怕，因為最後總會有那個，

Content: four-week window at the end for polish, and, of course everybody wants to polish at the end,
Content_zh: 四週的收尾打磨期，當然每個人最後都想打磨，

Content: even design wants to polish, and that trickles down.
Content_zh: 連設計也想打磨，然後壓力就一路往下傳。

Content: Animations get tweaked at the end, and then visual effects and sound effects
Content_zh: 動畫到最後會被調整，然後視覺特效和音效

Content: are the last two guys to kind of get, uh, to touch it.
Content_zh: 就是最後才會碰到內容的兩組人。

Content: So as long as everyone knows that the sound effects and the visual effects guys are last and they give some buffer,
Content_zh: 所以只要大家知道音效和視覺特效是最後接手的人，並留一點緩衝，

Content: then we shouldn't be too, uh, too screwed.
Content_zh: 那我們應該就不會太，呃，太慘。

Content: Stoddard: I want to make sure German gets hit because we have to re-volume graph
Content_zh: Stoddard：我要確保德文有被處理到，因為我們得重新做音量曲線，

Content: and re-special effects process all of the German recording for Act 1 and Act 2, and that's a tall order.
Content_zh: 也得重新處理第一幕和第二幕所有德文錄音的特效，這工程很大。

Content: Rice: Yeah, and it's getting delivered beginning of February, right, and then don't we--is the plan to have outsourcer on it
Content_zh: Rice：對，而且二月初會交過來，對吧？那我們……計畫是讓外包來處理嗎？

Content: that should take, like, three weeks?
Content_zh: 那應該要花三週？

Content: Stoddard: We--yeah. Hansen: We have Ashley coming in.
Content_zh: Stoddard：對。Hansen：Ashley 會進來。

Content: Stoddard: Yeah. Hansen: And she'll be, uh, helping...
Content_zh: Stoddard：對。Hansen：她會幫忙……

Content: -...specifically for this work. Rice: Yeah.
Content_zh: -專門處理這項工作。Rice：對。

Content: Schafer: I would like to ask you to join me in welcoming Ashley Coull to Double Fine.
Content_zh: Schafer：我想請大家一起歡迎 Ashley Coull 加入 Double Fine。

Content: There she is over there.
Content_zh: 她在那邊。

Content: Ashley.
Content_zh: Ashley。

Content: Coull: You know, a contract. It's a short amount of time and, you know, there-- there's no--there's no guarantee,
Content_zh: Coull：你知道，這是合約工作。時間很短，而且……沒有……沒有保證，

Content: and it was a staggering amount of work as well, but, uh, the opportunity to be here
Content_zh: 工作量也大得驚人，但能有機會來這裡，

Content: and be a part of this community, uh, Camden even pulled me out-- pulled me out of work one day,
Content_zh: 成為這個社群的一分子，呃，Camden 有一天甚至把我從工作裡拉出來，

Content: and I think he got about halfway through the sentence of, "Hey, so there's this contract thing," and I was like, "Yes."
Content_zh: 我想他大概話才說到一半：「嘿，所以有個合約的事……」我就說：「好。」

Content: And he was like, "I--uh, yeah," and I was like, "Yeah." Um, and that's kind of how--how
Content_zh: 然後他說：「我……呃，好。」我就說：「好。」嗯，大概就是這樣……

Content: the balls got--got rolling, I guess.
Content_zh: 事情大概就是這樣開始滾動的。

Content: Schafer: Because we have German VO in the game, which is awesome, and it sounds crazy. I started playing it.
Content_zh: Schafer：因為遊戲裡有德文 VO，這很棒，聽起來很瘋。我開始玩了。

Content: I mean, I don't mean crazy, I mean in a language that is not my own.
Content_zh: 我是說，不是真的瘋，是用一種不是我母語的語言。

Content: -German Vella: Hallo? Schafer: There we go.
Content_zh: -德文 Vella：Hallo？Schafer：來了。

Content: [Coughing] That's a German cough, obviously.
Content_zh: [咳嗽] 顯然是德式咳嗽。

Content: [Disproving sigh] [Laughter]
Content_zh: [不以為然的嘆氣] [笑聲]

Content: I really like the German version. I'm gonna play through the whole thing in German.
Content_zh: 我真的很喜歡德文版。我要用德文把整款玩完。

Content: Stoddard: Yeah, that was-- that was a-- the was a big, big thing,
Content_zh: Stoddard：對，那是……那是很大、很大的工作，

Content: so she's just-- she's kicking ass, Paul is kicking ass.
Content_zh: 所以她表現超棒，Paul 也表現超棒。

Content: He really is stepping up.
Content_zh: 他真的挺身而出了。

Content: I mean, it's like kind of both their moments to step up.
Content_zh: 我覺得這有點像是他們兩個挺身而出的時刻。

Content: O'Rourke: I mean, it's always enjoyable. Tim's writing is hilarious most of the time
Content_zh: O'Rourke：我覺得那一直都很有趣。Tim 的文字大多很好笑，

Content: and it's really good to just-- like, usually when I'm editing--
Content_zh: 而且單純去剪它就很棒……像我平常剪片時……

Content: I don't want to talk bad about, like, sports games or anything,
Content_zh: 我不是想說體育遊戲之類的壞話，

Content: but if I had to edit, like, Madden dialogue all day,
Content_zh: 但如果我要整天剪《Madden》的台詞，

Content: probably kill myself.
Content_zh: 我大概會想死。

Content: But going through Tim's stuff is actually pretty enjoyable.
Content_zh: 但剪 Tim 的東西其實滿愉快的。

Content: Um, I gave him a huge cut scene the other day.
Content_zh: 嗯，前幾天我丟給他一段很大的過場動畫。

Content: Dude, here's a big moment, go do it,
Content_zh: 老兄，這是個重頭戲，去寫吧，

Content: come back when it's done.
Content_zh: 寫完再回來。

Content: And he came back and it was damn near perfect.
Content_zh: 他回來時幾乎完美。

Content: Like he nailed it, so I'm like, okay, I'm not worried anymore.
Content_zh: 他整個做得很到位，所以我就想，好，我不擔心了。

Content: The layoffs were not good, um...
Content_zh: 裁員不妙，嗯……

Content: It's definitely-- This--this company is under stress.
Content_zh: 這家公司確實……確實承受很大壓力。

Content: Everybody is being super pro and they're making good product, but, like, it's-- it's heavy duty right now.
Content_zh: 每個人都非常專業，也都做出很好的成果，但現在真的很硬。

Content: And I'm just really happy to see this team kind of gel, uh, you know, in the trenches and really get it.
Content_zh: 我真的很高興看到這個團隊在戰壕裡逐漸凝聚起來，而且真的掌握狀況。

Content: Me?
Content_zh: 我？

Content: (speaking in German) [Offscreen] What was that? Franzke: I--what?
Content_zh: (德語) [畫外音] 那是什麼？ 我……

Content: [Laughter] Coull: Uh, I said I'm editing all the German lines.
Content_zh: [笑聲] Coull：呃，我說我在剪所有德文台詞。

Content: Franzke: Can I read-- can I read this?
Content_zh: Franzke：我能讀……我能讀這個嗎？

Content: [Laughter] Franzke: Oh.
Content_zh: [笑聲] Franzke：喔。

Content: Rice: We've gone through this now with all the leads, yeah,
Content_zh: Rice：我們現在已經跟所有組長過了一遍，對，

Content: but, um, yeah, now we wanted to present it it to you.
Content_zh: 不過，嗯，對，現在我們想把它呈現給你看。

Content: The next week is-- Schafer: Last set call.
Content_zh: 接下來一週是……Schafer：最後 set call。

Content: Rice: Huh? Schafer: Tim last call...
Content_zh: Rice：蛤？Schafer：Tim last call……

Content: Rice: Yeah, we'll get to that.
Content_zh: Rice：對，我們等一下會講到。

Content: So like, tomorrow the hope is during stand-ups to, like, relay this whole thing to the entire team,
Content_zh: 所以明天希望能在站會上，把整件事傳達給整個團隊，

Content: not just the leads.
Content_zh: 不只是各組組長。

Content: And I feel like we gotta kinda give, like,
Content_zh: 我覺得我們得傳達一點……

Content: a bit of a sense of urgency and just, like, that kind of thing.
Content_zh: 一點緊迫感，類似那樣。

Content: But I feel like it's also trying to put people's fears to rest, which would--I think one of the big ones is that,
Content_zh: 但我也覺得這是在試著讓大家安心，因為我想其中一個很大的擔心是，

Content: like, we're gonna continue to iterate on the game...
Content_zh: 像是我們會繼續反覆修改遊戲……

Content: -...and things like that. Schafer: So terrify them with the deadlines and put all their fears to rest.
Content_zh: -……之類的。Schafer：所以用期限嚇他們，再讓他們安心。

Content: Rice: And then hopefully, uh, just pep rally, pump people up?
Content_zh: Rice：然後希望，呃，就像動員大會，鼓舞一下大家？

Content: Schafer: If we use the words "dig deep" at any point, I'm just-- Hansen: Will you say it? Schafer: No.
Content_zh: Schafer：如果我們任何時候用到「dig deep」這種字眼，我就……Hansen：你會說嗎？Schafer：不會。

Content: Rice: No. Schafer: There's always a point where someone talks about digging deep,
Content_zh: Rice：不會。Schafer：總會有人說要「再撐一下」，

Content: and I just-- I don't want to say that.
Content_zh: 而我就是……我不想那樣說。

Content: So we all gotta dig deep, you guys.
Content_zh: 所以大家，我們都得再撐一下。

Content: Hansen: All right. Rice: Yeah, I pro-- I think I might put the dates
Content_zh: Hansen：好。Rice：對，我大概……我想我可能也會再把日期

Content: on the whiteboard again, too, just so everyone can look at them all the time.
Content_zh: 寫到白板上，讓大家隨時都看得到。

Content: Schafer: If they view that, they'll film it.
Content_zh: Schafer：他們要是看到，就會拍下來。

Content: Rice: Yeah, red, white, and blue.
Content_zh: Rice：對，紅、白、藍。

Content: Romero: That's encouraging.
Content_zh: Romero：真鼓舞人心。

Content: Broken Age, fuck yeah.
Content_zh: 《Broken Age》，他媽的讚。

Content: Schafer: Does that help?
Content_zh: Schafer：有用嗎？

Content: Romero: Tim last call. Is that a milestone?
Content_zh: Romero：Tim last call。那是個里程碑嗎？

Content: Rice: Fuck yes. Romero: Okay.
Content_zh: Rice：他媽的當然是。Romero：好。

Content: We submit to ratings boards on the fourth?
Content_zh: 我們四號要送交分級機構？

Content: Rice: Yeah, I think it's that-- Kipnis: When do we know what line...?
Content_zh: Rice：對，我想是那個……Kipnis：我們什麼時候知道哪一句……？

Content: Crook: Tim said he would try to call him. When he said you're hitting the line, it's okay.
Content_zh: Crook：Tim 說他會試著打給他。他說如果你踩到線，沒關係。

Content: Maybe I just gotta try to find one that...
Content_zh: 也許我只是想找一個……

Content: Rice: Ready? So we've been meeting production team with the leads
Content_zh: Rice：準備好了嗎？我們一直在跟各組組長開製作會議，

Content: to come up with closing plan stuff.
Content_zh: 討論專案收尾計畫。

Content: So next Friday we have our next Sony milestone, which Oliver is working on.
Content_zh: 所以下週五我們有下一個 Sony 里程碑，Oliver 正在處理。

Content: I think the big thing is PlayStation 4 running.
Content_zh: 我想最大的重點是讓 PlayStation 4 跑起來。

Content: Schafer: Is there anything on there new or shocking to anyone?
Content_zh: Schafer：上面有什麼新的或令人震驚的嗎？

Content: Crook: It's all shocking, but nothing's new.
Content_zh: Crook：全都很嚇人，但沒有新的。

Content: There's nothing new.
Content_zh: 沒什麼新的。

Content: Schafer: There is a lot of stuff to do in a short amount of time,
Content_zh: Schafer：短時間內確實有很多事要做，

Content: but there's no big unknowns to me, at least, on it.
Content_zh: 但至少對我來說，上面沒有什麼巨大的未知數。

Content: There's no design yet to do, dialogue yet to write, and big ques--
Content_zh: 沒有還沒做的設計、還沒寫的對話，或是很大的問題……

Content: things that could explode into-- I mean, like, it seems like it's a known amount of work now
Content_zh: 可能會爆開成……我是說，看起來現在工作量已經明確了，

Content: that can't expand, and, um, and it's clear that it can't slip
Content_zh: 不會再擴張，而且很清楚不能延，

Content: because you can see the commitments that are on it.
Content_zh: 因為你們看得到上面的各項承諾。

Content: As far as I'm concerned, like, everything is just no-- everything just has to be pushed through the machinery,
Content_zh: 對我來說，一切就是……一切都得推進那台機器裡，

Content: and that's the easy part, except for it's hard.
Content_zh: 而那就是簡單的部分，只是它很難。

Content: No, we're--we're the dream team, all here together.
Content_zh: 不，我們……我們是夢幻團隊，大家都在。

Content: For some reason, to me it's always relaxing when it's finite even if it is tight
Content_zh: 不知道為什麼，對我來說，只要事情有個期限，就會比較放鬆，即使很緊，

Content: because you know when it's gonna be over.
Content_zh: 因為你知道它什麼時候會結束。

Content: These next three weeks are really where the game goes from being good to great mostly.
Content_zh: 接下來這三週，基本上就是遊戲從好變到很棒的關鍵。

Content: So, um, it's gonna be exciting and, uh, if we have to order food,
Content_zh: 所以，嗯，會很刺激。如果我們需要訂餐，

Content: we'll order food.
Content_zh: 就訂餐。

Content: Crook: Food.
Content_zh: Crook：食物。

Content: Boston Market?
Content_zh: Boston Market？

Content: Schafer: No. Crook: Promise Boston Market, I'll-- Schafer: Wait, you want Boston-- Crook: I'll work late if you--
Content_zh: Schafer：不要。Crook：答應給 Boston Market，我就……Schafer：等等，你想要 Boston……Crook：如果你……我就加班。

Content: No, I'm just kidding. Kipnis: Wow.
Content_zh: 沒有啦，我開玩笑的。Kipnis：哇。

Content: Crook: Just kidding.
Content_zh: Crook：開玩笑的。

Content: Schafer: If you've gotta lure a man away from his family, make it Boston Market.
Content_zh: Schafer：如果你要把一個男人從家人身邊引開，那就拿 Boston Market 誘惑他。

Content: Crook: Yeah.
Content_zh: Crook：是啊。

Content: Schafer: It's like there's love in that meal.
Content_zh: Schafer：那一餐裡好像有愛。

Content: Kipnis: That's--that's what Caroline did for us during Psychonauts.
Content_zh: Kipnis：那就是 Caroline 當年在《Psychonauts》期間為我們做的事。

Content: Remember that? Rice: Boston Market?
Content_zh: 記得嗎？Rice：波士頓市場？

Content: Kipnis: Boston Market, like, every night.
Content_zh: Kipnis：Boston Market，幾乎每晚。

Content: Crook: Yep. Kipnis: And, uh, and I gained-- I gained, like, 15 pounds during during crunch.
Content_zh: Crook：對。Kipnis：然後，呃，我在 crunch 期間胖了大概 15 磅。

Content: Schafer: That's to keep you in your seat.
Content_zh: Schafer：那是為了把你固定在座位上。

Content: [Music] Schafer: Uh, on "Reds," we did a whole play-through of the team
Content_zh: [音樂] Schafer：呃，在「Reds」上，我們讓整個團隊完整玩了一遍，

Content: of the finale of the game to figure out how to push that towards, um, completion.
Content_zh: 讓整個團隊完整玩了一遍遊戲結尾，看看要怎麼把它推向完成。

Content: We are also starting on the PS4 version.
Content_zh: 我們也開始做 PS4 版本。

Content: Hansen: So we have a milestone on the 23rd, and that's to have it, like,
Content_zh: Hansen：所以我們 23 號有個里程碑，目標是讓它，像是，

Content: "playable," um, on that platform, so-- But it looks like that's come along really well,
Content_zh: 在那個平台上「可玩」，嗯，所以……但看起來進展很不錯，

Content: so good job, Oliver.
Content_zh: 做得好，Oliver。

Content: Schafer: Look at it playing on the PS4.
Content_zh: Schafer：看，它在 PS4 上跑了。

Content: [Offscreen] How's the port process been going in general?
Content_zh: [畫外音] 整體來說移植進展如何？

Content: Franzke: It's good. We essentially added PlayStation 4 and PlayStation Vita
Content_zh: Franzke：進展不錯。我們基本上把 PS4 和 PS Vita

Content: to a list of platforms, but kept the ship date the same,
Content_zh: 加進平台清單，但發行日保持不變，

Content: um, so that makes things a bit more interesting.
Content_zh: 嗯，這讓事情更有趣。

Content: I love working on consoles, but it's a very different kind of challenge, like,
Content_zh: 我喜歡做主機版，但那是很不一樣的挑戰，像是，

Content: for example, the Vita is very memory constrained, um, so that, you know,
Content_zh: 比如說，Vita 的記憶體限制很嚴格，所以，你知道，

Content: it's--it's a very tight memory budget for--for the game, and if you're just leaking some memory somewhere,
Content_zh: 遊戲的記憶體預算非常緊，如果你在某個地方漏了一點記憶體，

Content: like, you're gonna have a bad time later on, so there are, like, a lot of really interesting things
Content_zh: 之後就會很慘，所以有很多很有意思的事情

Content: you need to take into consideration.
Content_zh: 你需要考慮到。

Content: Or can you compress the data in some way and stuff like that.
Content_zh: 或者能不能用某種方式壓縮資料之類的。

Content: And I think the end-- the end will be tough, for sure, shipping.
Content_zh: 我覺得最後……最後肯定會很艱難，尤其是推出這件事。

Content: Like, so, for--for consoles, um, what you have to do in order to release games
Content_zh: 像是主機版，嗯，你要推出遊戲的話，

Content: is you have to go to something that's called certifications.
Content_zh: 就必須經過一個叫 certification 的流程。

Content: The next milestone is on the 20th, which is-- like, it's very ominously called, like, beta
Content_zh: 下一個里程碑是 20 號，它聽起來很不祥地叫做 Beta，

Content: which is supposed to be TRC complete, uh, essentially for Sony
Content_zh: 本來應該要達到 TRC complete，呃，主要是 Sony 這邊，

Content: so there's a lot of stuff that needs to happen before that.
Content_zh: 所以在那之前有很多事得完成。

Content: Those are all the requirements you need for shipping a game on a--on a Sony platform.
Content_zh: 那些就是在 Sony 平台上推出遊戲必須符合的所有要求。

Content: Schafer: I'm sure we're TRC complete.
Content_zh: Schafer：我敢肯定我們已經 TRC complete。

Content: Franzke: Oh, yeah, no problem.
Content_zh: Franzke：喔，對，完全沒問題。

Content: Um, so they will essentially, like, run a game and make sure that every one of those requirements is met.
Content_zh: 嗯，所以他們基本上會跑遊戲，確認每一項要求都有達成。

Content: [Offscreen] How does stuff like Assassin's Creed happen?
Content_zh: [畫外音] 那像《Assassin’s Creed》那種狀況是怎麼發生的？

Content: Oliver: Uh, I'd rather not comment on that.
Content_zh: Oliver：呃，我寧願不評價。

Content: It's really sad, because I'm pretty sure all the people who worked on the game, you know,
Content_zh: 真的很難過，因為我很確定所有做這款遊戲的人，

Content: didn't want to release something that's substandard.
Content_zh: 都不想推出不合格的東西。

Content: Um, so very often, it's--it's-- actually really sad for the developers,
Content_zh: 所以很多時候，這對開發者來說其實真的很難過，

Content: but there's a lot of, like, pressure from various departments
Content_zh: 但來自各個部門的壓力很多，

Content: to make the game happen essentially.
Content_zh: 基本上就是要讓遊戲能推出。

Content: Are you feeling some form of pressure like that now?
Content_zh: 你現在也感受到那種壓力嗎？

Content: Well, I mean, but if you-- if you don't have a publisher who's, like, does what, uh, needs to happen,
Content_zh: 嗯，我是說，如果你沒有一個發行商會去做該做的事，

Content: but as you can see, everything is so tightly packed, uh, that there's really no time to slip any of those milestones.
Content_zh: 但你也看得到，所有事情排得非常緊，真的沒有時間讓任何里程碑延後。

Content: Franzke: Yes, please. -Okay.
Content_zh: Franzke：好，麻煩了。 -好。

Content: See, crunch has already started.
Content_zh: 你看，crunch 已經開始了。

Content: Schafer: Yeah, we're getting near the end where some nights people are working late
Content_zh: Schafer：對，我們快到尾聲了，有些晚上大家會加班，

Content: and we're ordering food, and, um...
Content_zh: 我們會訂吃的，嗯……

Content: and hopefully that won't be too long till it's over.
Content_zh: 希望不用太久就能結束。

Content: And people who are staying late now, it's 'cause they want to make sure the game is really good.
Content_zh: 而現在還留到很晚的人，是因為他們想確保遊戲真的夠好。

Content: [Music] I know the biggest hurdle is just the amount
Content_zh: [音樂] 我知道最大的難關就是工作量，

Content: of work there is to do.
Content_zh: 還有很多工作要做。

Content: Uh, we have to do a whole bunch of cut scenes.
Content_zh: 我們還得做一大堆過場動畫。

Content: Still have to go in.
Content_zh: 還沒放進去。

Content: Crook: Camden there was the issue with, uh, Bob Chothra coming out of the mountain
Content_zh: Crook：Camden，那邊有個問題，呃，Bob Chothra 從山裡出來那段，

Content: that we were gonna-- did you talk to Tim about that and Peter?
Content_zh: 你和 Tim 談過這件事嗎？

Content: I don't know about-- I'm in that scene still.
Content_zh: 我不知道……我仍然在那一幕。

Content: We're making some changes, so I just-- Stoddard: Okay.
Content_zh: 我們在做一些修改，所以我只是……Stoddard：好。

Content: Schafer: Just saying that gave Ray a headache.
Content_zh: Schafer：光是這樣說就讓 Ray 頭痛了。

Content: Offscreen: How is the ending cut scene coming along, since that was sort of, uh-- that had to be--
Content_zh: 畫外音：結尾過場動畫進展如何？因為那個算是，呃……必須……

Content: the music had to be done, so that was kind of locked.
Content_zh: 音樂必須先完成，所以那段算是鎖定了。

Content: Schafer: Yeah, yeah, 'cause we kind of locked it, but I feel good about the pacing of that, just based on the music.
Content_zh: Schafer：對，因為我們算是把它鎖定了，但光從音樂來看，我覺得那段節奏不錯。

Content: Um, and it was so big we had to split it between two animators, Miyuki and Chris Lam.
Content_zh: 嗯，那段太大了，所以我們得拆給兩位動畫師，Miyuki 和 Chris Lam。

Content: So Miyuki was doing the first half and Chris was doing the second half.
Content_zh: 所以 Miyuki 做前半段，Chris 做後半段。

Content: And then we're gonna stitch it back together.
Content_zh: 然後我們再把它拼回去。

Content: Oh, I like that. That's a good idea.
Content_zh: 喔，我喜歡。這是好主意。

Content: Crook: Yeah, that was really good.
Content_zh: Crook：是啊，那真的很好。

Content: That's cute.
Content_zh: 真可愛。

Content: Richardson: Like, uh, so many characters, and...
Content_zh: Richardson：像，呃，很多角色，和……

Content: and it's kind of a big thing, right?
Content_zh: 這是件大事，對吧？

Content: It's ending, end of the game, so that's kind of exciting, but still goin' like,
Content_zh: 這是結尾，遊戲的結尾，所以有點令人興奮，但還是會覺得，

Content: "Ooh, that's a lot of things to do." Crook: Maybe not the happy eyes? Lam: No.
Content_zh: 「喔，要做的東西好多。」Crook：也許不要那麼開心的眼神？Lam：不要。

Content: Schafer: Yeah, like, the delirious eyes, like yay, he's more like...
Content_zh: Schafer：對，像那種神智不清的眼神，像耶，他比較像……

Content: Hm.
Content_zh: 嗯。

Content: "You run, I got this." Crook: All right. Schafer: "Save yourself."
Content_zh: 「你快跑，這裡交給我。」Crook：好。Schafer：「保命要緊。」

Content: Thumb's up.
Content_zh: 比讚。

Content: Crook: Yeah, he got that on film. We might need to...
Content_zh: Crook：對，他拍下來了。我們可能需要……

Content: Schafer: This ping pong ball, his face.
Content_zh: Schafer：這顆乒乓球，他的臉。

Content: Lam: The parts that I have to do that are kind of those, you know, resolution moments,
Content_zh: Lam：我要做的那些部分，有點像，你知道，收束情感的時刻，

Content: they're gonna be a little challenging but-- to get the expressions on the characters right
Content_zh: 會有點挑戰，不過……要把角色表情做對，

Content: so that you know that they're thinking, they're not just staring into dead space and stuff like that.
Content_zh: 讓你知道他們是在思考，而不是只是盯著空處之類的。

Content: Crook: Think you got enough info there?
Content_zh: Crook：你覺得你的資料夠多了嗎？

Content: Okay. Lam: Yes.
Content_zh: 好。Lam：是。

Content: Crook: The plan is to just take it to that, um, shippable stage.
Content_zh: Crook：計畫就是先把它做到，嗯，可以出貨的狀態。

Content: And then, uh, that will allow all the effects and the sound to get put in, um, 'cause all the timing will be locked down.
Content_zh: 然後，呃，這樣所有特效和音效就能放進去，嗯，因為所有時間點都會鎖定。

Content: So the--the plan is that they'll go back to it, uh, to do some polish, um,
Content_zh: 所以……計畫是之後他們會再回頭，呃，做一些打磨，嗯，

Content: after we get all the content in.
Content_zh: 等我們把內容都弄進來。

Content: Schafer: Is this a good time to look at it?
Content_zh: Schafer：現在是看它的時候嗎？

Content: It would be a good time to look at it, yes.
Content_zh: 最好看看，是的。

Content: It doesn't--sometimes it seems like in that whole thing, there's not a shot that shows--
Content_zh: 有時候整段看起來好像沒有一個鏡頭能顯示……

Content: that really shows the entire scene.
Content_zh: 真正把整個場面呈現出來。

Content: Schafer: But, I mean, you know what's left and you know what's right.
Content_zh: Schafer：可是，我是說，你知道哪邊是左、哪邊是右。

Content: Crook: Yeah, like, this is the only shot we have.
Content_zh: Crook：對，像這就是我們唯一有的鏡頭。

Content: Rice: That's the shot that shows most-- Crook: What--uh, I don't know.
Content_zh: Rice：這就是最能顯示……Crook：什麼……呃，我不知道。

Content: I just kept thinking that, like-- You could almost do-- Rice: if it's a flip book,
Content_zh: 我一直在想，像是……你幾乎可以……Rice：如果它像翻頁動畫，

Content: you could almost--you could have other people that we don't know
Content_zh: 你幾乎可以……你可以放一些我們不認識的其他人，

Content: that are on the sides from both villages.
Content_zh: 站在兩個村子兩側。

Content: Crook: All these people, like here.
Content_zh: Crook：所有的人，像這裡。

Content: Schafer: But where do they come from? Crook: Well, they came from...
Content_zh: Schafer：但他們是從哪裡來的？Crook：嗯，他們來自……

Content: Rice: From the monster lands town, like, there's a big battle going on.
Content_zh: Rice：從怪物之地的村子來，像是有場大戰正在發生。

Content: They've come to gawk.
Content_zh: 他們是來圍觀的。

Content: Crook: That's fine. I mean, if you're-- But we--but we can't-- we don't want...
Content_zh: Crook：那倒可以。我是說，如果你……但我們……但我們不能……我們不想……

Content: -...to animate more people. Stoddard: Yeah, yeah, I know.
Content_zh: -再多做一些人物動畫。Stoddard：對，對，我知道。

Content: Rice: But that's what you're saying. Schafer: It's really important not to add features to the game
Content_zh: Rice：但你就是這個意思。Schafer：Ray，這個時間點不要再往遊戲裡加功能，真的很重要。

Content: at this point Ray.
Content_zh: Ray，現在這個階段。

Content: I like the melting you're adding.
Content_zh: 我喜歡你加的融化效果。

Content: I wouldn't jump to that melting platform.
Content_zh: 我才不會跳到那個正在融化的平台上。

Content: Crook: Yeah, that's true. She has no shoes.
Content_zh: Crook：對，沒錯。她沒穿鞋。

Content: Camden: She's tough. She's a baker.
Content_zh: Camden：她很強悍，她是麵包師。

Content: Crook: She walks on coals. Schafer: She doesn't use oven mitts anymore.
Content_zh: Crook：她都走在炭火上。Schafer：她已經不用隔熱手套了。

Content: Oh, that's good. That's perfect.
Content_zh: 喔，這很好。很完美。

Content: So I think this would be-- this needs something here.
Content_zh: 所以我覺得這裡會……這裡需要加點東西。

Content: Inversin: It--it has something, not in this scene, but there is-- I can--I can move it into that scene also if you want.
Content_zh: Inversin：它……它有東西，不在這場戲裡，但確實有……如果你想，我也可以把它移進這場戲。

Content: Schafer: 'Cause it seemed like he was backing up from nothing.
Content_zh: Schafer：因為他看起來像是在對著空氣倒退。

Content: Inversin: So, like, it's in there, too, so I can add it to the other one.
Content_zh: Inversin：所以那邊也有，我可以把它加到另一場戲裡。

Content: Schafer: I just think it--think it could be, like, half as much?
Content_zh: Schafer：我只是覺得……可能是一半嗎？

Content: Crook: That looks really cool.
Content_zh: Crook：看起來很酷。

Content: Schafer: It kind of explains why he jumps now.
Content_zh: Schafer：這樣就解釋了他現在為什麼會跳。

Content: That's perfect. I think that's perfect as far as the rain goes.
Content_zh: 我覺得雨的部分這樣很完美。

Content: -Awesome. -Yeah.
Content_zh: -太棒了。 -對。

Content: -Then we're done. -Yeah.
Content_zh: -那我們就完成了。 -對。

Content: That was easy.
Content_zh: 那很容易。

Content: Boop boop. Yeah, that was really good.
Content_zh: 嗶嗶。對，真的很好。

Content: Thanks.
Content_zh: 謝謝。

Content: Oh, crying for us.
Content_zh: 喔，還替我們哭了。

Content: Crook: Yeah.
Content_zh: Crook：是啊。

Content: [Music] Rice: But we're finally now getting down to-- to final days, I guess.
Content_zh: [音樂] Rice：不過我想我們現在終於真的進入最後幾天了。

Content: [Music] Crook: But, yeah, we're all a little on edge, a little stressed out,
Content_zh: [音樂] Crook：不過，對，我們都有點緊繃、有點壓力，

Content: but, um, it'll be okay.
Content_zh: 但會沒事的。

Content: Hansen: Anna's here almost constantly, and, you know, I can-- I see the light at the end of the tunnel.
Content_zh: Hansen：Anna 幾乎一直都在，而且，你知道，我看得到隧道盡頭的光了。

Content: We love these games, but, you know, we all kind of need to take a break.
Content_zh: 我們愛這些遊戲，但你知道，我們也都需要休息一下。

Content: And people need to get some sleep, too.
Content_zh: 大家也需要睡點覺。

Content: It's been a rough few months.
Content_zh: 這幾個月很辛苦。

Content: Crook: I mean, we're gonna be pushing to the very end.
Content_zh: Crook：我是說，我們會一路拚到最後。

Content: [Off screen] Like that guy there. Crook: Oh yeah he is.
Content_zh: [畫外音] 像那邊那個人。Crook：喔，對，他就是。

Content: I think he didn't go home last night.
Content_zh: 我覺得他昨晚沒回家。

Content: But apparently he has, like, a little bed over there.
Content_zh: 但顯然他那邊有張小床。

Content: So I'm just like, that's not a good thing.
Content_zh: 所以我就覺得，這不太好。

Content: Stoddard: I don't want to romanticize it.
Content_zh: Stoddard：我不想把這件事浪漫化。

Content: I know--I know that Tim wants to show how the sausage gets made,
Content_zh: 我知道……我知道 Tim 想呈現 sausage 是怎麼做出來的，

Content: and this has been-- this has been hard.
Content_zh: 而這一直……這一直很難。

Content: Schafer: We're also getting kind of griefed by, um, certain fringe organizations
Content_zh: Schafer：我們也被某些邊緣組織

Content: and attack groups organized, and, uh, that was a bummer.
Content_zh: 和有組織的攻擊團體騷擾，呃，那也很掃興。

Content: And then we had the layoffs which were a huge bummer.
Content_zh: 然後我們又裁員，那也非常糟。

Content: And, um, a bunch of bad news.
Content_zh: 還有，嗯，一堆壞消息。

Content: Rice: There is, like, a group of people that are hoping that we won't succeed for some weird reason,
Content_zh: Rice：有一群人，不知道為什麼，就是希望我們不要成功。

Content: um, or that are at least heavily scrutinizing us.
Content_zh: 嗯，或至少非常仔細地盯著我們。

Content: And it definitely has been something that's been weighing on a lot of people.
Content_zh: 那確實讓很多人都背著很大的壓力。

Content: Franzke: The endless thing of, like, people, like, oh, well, maybe they shouldn't have taken the--the money
Content_zh: Franzke：那種沒完沒了的聲音，像是有人說：喔，也許他們當初不該拿那筆錢……

Content: and only make half the game. Well, you know, all I can say to that is, like,
Content_zh: 然後只做半款遊戲。嗯，你知道，對這種話我只能說，

Content: if you would be, like, we're sitting here, you know, working our asses off to make this game.
Content_zh: 如果你像我們一樣坐在這裡，拼了命地做這款遊戲。

Content: Kipnis: And, like, you do, you question yourself.
Content_zh: Kipnis：而且你真的會質疑自己。

Content: Like, yeah, maybe we-- what the fuck, maybe we don't know what the--what we're doing.
Content_zh: 像是，對，也許我們……搞不好我們根本不知道自己在幹嘛。

Content: Who knows?
Content_zh: 誰知道呢？

Content: But you just have to trust and know, like, this is actually-- game development
Content_zh: 但你只能相信，也要知道，遊戲開發

Content: is not an easy thing.
Content_zh: 不是一件容易的事。

Content: Schafer: And now we're gonna ship Broken Age, and that's all gonna be great.
Content_zh: Schafer：現在我們要推出《Broken Age》，一切都會很棒。

Content: So, um, it's a relief to get out of that-- out of that period.
Content_zh: 所以，嗯，能走出那段時期真的鬆了一口氣。

Content: [Offscreen] What's going on right now at this stage of the project?
Content_zh: [畫外音] 專案這一階段發生了什麼事？

Content: Romero: So where we are is, we're less than a month out from our first submission,
Content_zh: Romero：所以我們現在距離第一次 submission 不到一個月，

Content: which is the, um, where you submit to Sony and we release the mastering for the PC,
Content_zh: 也就是，嗯，要送交 Sony 認證，並釋出 PC 實體版的母片，

Content: physical copies that we're doing with Nordic.
Content_zh: 也就是我們和 Nordic 合作的實體版。

Content: So the 20th is the big day where just everything has to sort of be done by that point.
Content_zh: 所以 20 號是大日子，到那時基本上一切都得完成。

Content: Rice: Uh, yes, I've been working on some Nordic stuff, too, along with Vic. Um... We got the box prints
Content_zh: Rice：嗯，對，我也和 Vic 一起處理一些 Nordic 的事。嗯……我們拿到了盒裝印樣，

Content: from them and they just look a little bit dark so we're doing, like, another round on those
Content_zh: 它們看起來有點暗，所以我們要再調一輪，

Content: before they actually start printing them in bulk.
Content_zh: 等他們真正開始大量印刷之前。

Content: Uh, but hopefully that'll happen soon.
Content_zh: 但希望很快就會發生。

Content: Schafer: But we don't get a sample before they make a zillion of them?
Content_zh: Schafer：他們做出一大堆之前，我們拿不到樣品嗎？

Content: Rice: No, unfortunately. Schafer: Exciting.
Content_zh: Rice：拿不到，很遺憾。Schafer：刺激。

Content: Rice: Yeah. Schafer: That's exciting.
Content_zh: Rice：對。Schafer：真刺激。

Content: This is just one of Cory's mock-ups of the box.
Content_zh: 這只是 Cory 做的盒裝 mock-up。

Content: This is the box.
Content_zh: 這是盒子。

Content: This is--the disc's not gonna look like that.
Content_zh: 光碟不會長那樣。

Content: I wanted the disc to be the O from Broken Age.
Content_zh: 我想讓光碟變成《Broken Age》裡那個 O。

Content: This is gonna be like the O, and that's the box.
Content_zh: 這會像那個 O，而那就是盒子。

Content: And we're first looking at it, we're like, this is cool 'cause it shows the split thing,
Content_zh: 我們一開始看到時覺得很酷，因為它呈現了分裂的概念，

Content: but it really overemphasizes Vella over Shay, 'cause Shay's upside down so he's, like, easier to ignore.
Content_zh: 但它真的太強調 Vella、弱化 Shay 了，因為 Shay 是倒過來的，所以比較容易被忽略。

Content: It was like, wouldn't it be crazy if we could print Vella and Shay
Content_zh: 我們就在想，如果能把 Vella 和 Shay 印在，

Content: on a separate clear slipcover, and then you could slide it off
Content_zh: 另一個透明書套上，然後你可以把它抽出來，

Content: and turn it around and slide it back down and then Shay would be in Vella's world and vice versa,
Content_zh: 轉個方向再套回去，這樣 Shay 就會在 Vella 的世界裡，反之亦然，

Content: Which, no spoilers, but that's some foreshadowing there.
Content_zh: 這不是劇透，但那其實有一點伏筆。

Content: And it would be so neat.
Content_zh: 那樣就太酷了。

Content: It would be like Led Zeppelin.
Content_zh: 就會像 Led Zeppelin 那樣。

Content: Rice: We'll nail it. It'll be great.
Content_zh: Rice：我們會搞定的，會很棒。

Content: -Um... Kipnis: Wow.
Content_zh: -嗯……Kipnis：哇。

Content: Romero: So right now the big tasks are-- or the big areas are bugs.
Content_zh: Romero：所以現在最大的任務……或者最大的領域，就是 bug。

Content: O'Rourke: Yeah, we're in Starship Troopers mode basically, just killing all the bugs.
Content_zh: O'Rourke：對，我們基本上進入《Starship Troopers》模式，一直殺 bug。

Content: Schafer: Taking showers together or what are you-- Coull: No. Schafer: I'm sorry, that's...
Content_zh: Schafer：一起洗澡還是什麼嗎？Coull：不是。Schafer：抱歉，那是……

Content: not the first thing I think about.
Content_zh: 不是我第一個想到的。

Content: O'Rouke: There's the daily shower scene in the audio room.
Content_zh: O'Rouke：音效室每天都有淋浴戲。

Content: Kipnis: I'm a little bit concerned about our deadline.
Content_zh: Kipnis：我有點擔心我們的期限。

Content: Like, right here it says A and B bugs only.
Content_zh: 這裡寫的是只修 A 和 B bug。

Content: Like, that's not likely gonna happen, especially since we have brand new cut scenes.
Content_zh: 那大概不太可能，尤其是我們還有全新的過場動畫。

Content: Schafer: Starting now or next week?
Content_zh: Schafer：從現在或下週開始？

Content: Kipnis: Next week.
Content_zh: Kipnis：下週。

Content: Uh, that's likely not happening because we have a bunch of new, um, cut scenes coming.
Content_zh: 呃，那大概不會發生，因為我們還有一堆新的，嗯，過場動畫要進來。

Content: Content is still coming in and we can't actually do that until all content is in the game.
Content_zh: 內容還在進來，而所有內容放進遊戲之前，我們其實沒辦法做到那件事。

Content: Schafer: What's this selective bug fixing?
Content_zh: Schafer：這個「選擇性修 bug」是什麼？

Content: Almost sounds more open-ended than A and B 'cause we select to do a C.
Content_zh: 聽起來反而比 A 和 B 更開放，因為我們可以選一個 C 來修。

Content: Right, that's how that works?
Content_zh: 就是這樣的嗎？

Content: Kipnis: Nope. Rice: I don't think so.
Content_zh: Kipnis：不。Rice：我不覺得。

Content: Kipnis: But if you play the game all the way through, um, from Act 1,
Content_zh: Kipnis：但如果你從第一幕開始一路把遊戲玩完，嗯，

Content: that Act 1 is very clean, and we have to make Act 2 look that clean,
Content_zh: 第一幕非常乾淨，而我們得讓第二幕看起來一樣乾淨，

Content: and that's a lot of C-bug fixing.
Content_zh: 這可是很多 C bug 的修復。

Content: And so, like, we can't suddenly switch to A and Bs only next week.
Content_zh: 所以，我們不能下週突然切成只修 A 和 B。

Content: Like, it's just not-- it's gonna be basically like a, I don't know,
Content_zh: 那樣就是……基本上會變成，我不知道，

Content: not a very clean game, I guess.
Content_zh: 我猜遊戲就不會那麼乾淨。

Content: Romero: Uh, Act 2 is interesting because we're not just doing PC, Mac, and Linux digital,
Content_zh: Romero：呃，第二幕很有趣，因為我們不只是做 PC、Mac 和 Linux 數位版，

Content: um, we're doing physical, when--and really that goes back to the old school way,
Content_zh: 嗯，我們也做實體版，而那其實回到了老派做法，

Content: which is you get to the point in the project where you're gonna ship a physical disc,
Content_zh: 也就是專案走到要推出實體光碟的階段，

Content: you have to cut off bug fixing.
Content_zh: 你就必須停止修 bug。

Content: You have to be certain that the build you're shipping is the one,
Content_zh: 你必須確定你要出貨的 build 就是最終版，

Content: because someone's gonna, in theory, buy the box and get the game,
Content_zh: 因為理論上會有人買盒裝，拿到遊戲，

Content: and that has to have all the, you know, be bug-free as-- as bug-free as possible and as solid as possible,
Content_zh: 而它必須，你知道，盡可能沒有 bug、盡可能穩定，

Content: so they'll just have the disc and the game that's on there.
Content_zh: 因為他們手上就只有那張光碟和裡面的遊戲。

Content: That's it.
Content_zh: 就這樣。

Content: Kipnis: I don't have confidence at the moment that we have--we're really
Content_zh: Kipnis：我現在沒有信心覺得我們真的……

Content: at the bug count that we are.
Content_zh: 真的只有目前看到的 bug 數量。

Content: Or, like, I--I expect that the bugs will increase tremendously,
Content_zh: 或者說，我……我預期 bug 數量會大幅增加，

Content: or should, because I think they are in there.
Content_zh: 或者說應該會增加，因為我覺得 bug 就在裡面。

Content: Romero: They're still there. Kipnis: Yeah.
Content_zh: Romero：它們還在。Kipnis：對。

Content: Franzke: It's still gonna be good, like, I mean, this game has been out for such a long time, I think
Content_zh: Franzke：它還是會很好的，我是說，這款遊戲已經開發這麼久了，我覺得，

Content: it's gonna be stable and it's gonna be good, but there's always, like,
Content_zh: 它會很穩定，而且會很好，但總有，像，

Content: so much more that we would have liked to do and, like, we're now at a point where
Content_zh: 我們本來想做的還多得多，而現在已經走到一個階段，

Content: that's just not gonna be possible.
Content_zh: 那些事就是不可能了。

Content: We need to, you know, make sure that the game is stable.
Content_zh: 我們必須，你知道，確保遊戲穩定。

Content: You know, you look-- you look at your bug database and you list some issues that you have in there
Content_zh: 你知道，你去看 bug 資料庫，列出裡面的那些問題，

Content: and it's, like, a lot, and it's like, how are we gonna be able to--to finish that?
Content_zh: 會發現真的很多，然後就會想：我們到底要怎麼完成？

Content: We'll have to probably do some bug triaging next week to just see kind of, okay, well, all of these issues
Content_zh: 我們下週大概得做一些 bug triage，看看，好，這些問題裡，

Content: that are in the bug database right now, which one are we realistically gonna be able to even do now?
Content_zh: 目前 bug 資料庫裡的哪些，是我們現在實際上還做得到的？

Content: And then they have to-- there will have to be some hard decisions.
Content_zh: 然後就必須做出一些艱難的決定。

Content: It's like, okay, well, we can only do one or the other, so which one of these issues,
Content_zh: 像是，好，我們只能做這個或那個，那這些問題裡，

Content: polish items is more important to you?
Content_zh: 哪一個 polish 事項對你比較重要？

Content: And then we're gonna do that but not the other.
Content_zh: 然後我們就做那個，另一個就不做。

Content: And it's just the nature of the beast.
Content_zh: 這就是現實。

Content: [Music] Hansen: Resources in 12. Schafer: That would be great.
Content_zh: [音樂] Hansen：資源在 12。Schafer：那太好了。

Content: Uh, and yeah, we'll have to re-- and I mean, obviously,
Content_zh: 嗯，對，我們得重新……顯然，

Content: analyze the bugs every day and how they're tracking.
Content_zh: 每天分析 bug，以及它們的變化。

Content: Are all the GPs back from sickness?
Content_zh: 所有 GP 都病好了嗎？

Content: Hansen: No, Anna's still out. Stoddard: Two down.
Content_zh: Hansen：沒有，Anna 還沒回來。Stoddard：倒了兩個。

Content: Hansen: But-- Schafer: She's gonna be out today, too?
Content_zh: Hansen：但是……Schafer：她今天也不能來嗎？

Content: Hansen: She's trying to get some medicine that'll allow her to work this week,
Content_zh: Hansen：她在想辦法拿點藥，讓她這週能工作，

Content: so she's that bad.
Content_zh: 所以她病得很嚴重。

Content: Schafer: Holy cow.
Content_zh: Schafer：天啊。

Content: Crook: She was working really late hours.
Content_zh: Crook：她一直工作到很晚。

Content: I think she was probably-- Her immune system was already
Content_zh: 我想她可能……她的免疫系統已經

Content: pretty vulnerable, and, um, and she--she got whatever, I don't know.
Content_zh: 很脆弱，然後，嗯，她……不知道感染了什麼。

Content: I hope--I don't know, she hasn't said.
Content_zh: 希望……我不知道，她沒說。

Content: She went to the doctor.
Content_zh: 她去看醫生了。

Content: Hopefully it's not pneumonia or something, but, um,
Content_zh: 希望不是肺炎什麼的，但是，嗯，

Content: hopefully she'll be back with us on Monday.
Content_zh: 希望她星期一能回到我們身邊。

Content: But--but we know that the most important thing for her is just to get better.
Content_zh: 但我們知道，對她來說最重要的就是把身體養好。

Content: You know, it's just a video game.
Content_zh: 你知道，這只是一款電玩。

Content: You know, she's, you know, her health is the most important thing,
Content_zh: 你知道，她的健康才是最重要的，

Content: so, um, so that's why it's been great.
Content_zh: 所以，嗯，這也是很棒的地方。

Content: Everyone has just jumped in to try and help out, and nobody blames anybody for anything.
Content_zh: 大家都跳進來幫忙，也沒有人怪任何人。

Content: -It's just one of those things. Boehle: I'll probably just filter, like, Anna's open or new bugs, like, priority two and higher,
Content_zh: -這就是會發生的事。Boehle：我大概會先篩 Anna 開著或新開的 bug，像優先級二以上的，

Content: and then if there's anything UI related, I'll just grab those and--
Content_zh: 如果有 UI 相關的，我就把那些接過來……

Content: Franzke: Right. Yeah, I think we have to.
Content_zh: Franzke：對。我覺得我們必須這麼做。

Content: I mean, it's just kind of-- sounds like Anna's hit pretty hard.
Content_zh: 我是說，聽起來 Anna 真的病得很重。

Content: Hansen: But it's still difficult because, you know, there's a lot of ownership over the code,
Content_zh: Hansen：但這還是很困難，因為你知道，很多程式碼都有各自的負責人，

Content: so Anna will be able to get something done a lot faster than anybody else just 'cause she's so familiar
Content_zh: 所以 Anna 會比其他人快很多，因為她非常熟悉

Content: with all the inner workings of how this stuff is all hooked up.
Content_zh: 很熟這些東西內部到底是怎麼接起來的。

Content: That makes it more difficult, for sure, 'cause all the pressure's on her right now.
Content_zh: 這確實讓事情更難，因為現在壓力全在她身上。

Content: Rice: I guess at least through the week and then, I just--I guess I wonder when we're gonna get
Content_zh: Rice：我想至少這週是這樣。然後我只是……我在想我們什麼時候才能開始

Content: to other platform work, but for now it's obvious.
Content_zh: 處理其他平台的工作，但目前狀況很明顯。

Content: It seems like this is until we're locking stuff down.
Content_zh: 看起來會一直這樣，直到我們封版。

Content: Franzke: I mean, like, whenever there's an actual pre-cert issue coming in from Sony,
Content_zh: Franzke：我是說，每當 Sony 真的丟進來預認證問題，

Content: I'm jumping on it right away because I want to get them,
Content_zh: 我會馬上處理，因為我想把它們

Content: like, fixed as soon as possible.
Content_zh: 盡快修好。

Content: But so far it's been pretty good.
Content_zh: 但目前還不錯。

Content: I think actually not that many bugs been reported from pre-certs.
Content_zh: 其實我覺得預認證那邊回報的 bug 沒有很多。

Content: Rice: So, yeah, whathaveibeenworkingon? We have a couple things.
Content_zh: Rice：所以，對，我最近在做什麼？有幾件事。

Content: Today we set up a bug triage meeting with all of the leads.
Content_zh: 今天我們安排了一場和所有組長的 bug triage 會議。

Content: So, um, producers and leads and Tim, are gonna kind of read through everything in the bug database,
Content_zh: 所以，嗯，製作人、組長和 Tim 會一起把 bug 資料庫裡的東西看過一遍，

Content: reevaluating where we are with that.
Content_zh: 重新評估我們現在的狀況。

Content: So that'll be happening this afternoon.
Content_zh: 那今天下午就會做。

Content: Schafer: Hey, everybody, hello. Rice: Hi.
Content_zh: Schafer：大家好 Rice：嗨。

Content: Schafer: This is probably the last meeting of the project, right?
Content_zh: Schafer：這可能是專案的最後一次會議，對吧？

Content: Rice: Um... Probably not.
Content_zh: Rice：嗯……可能不是。

Content: Schafer: We're so close. Rice: Big one, though.
Content_zh: Schafer：我們好接近了。Rice：不過是場大會。

Content: Rice: It's a big one. Franzke: Apart from the meeting where we get all the royalty checks?
Content_zh: Rice：這場很重要。Franzke：除了我們領權利金支票的那場會議以外？

Content: Schafer: Yeah, that's after. That's after.
Content_zh: Schafer：對，那在後面。那在後面。

Content: We have to ship it first, Oliver.
Content_zh: 我們得先把它推出去，Oliver。

Content: But yeah, so we're gonna look over the bug database and see if we can get rid of some bugs.
Content_zh: 不過對，我們要看一下 bug 資料庫，看看能不能消掉一些 bug。

Content: Rice: I think the hope is really just trying to get an idea of which ones we definitely need to fix
Content_zh: Rice：我想希望是想瞭解我們需要修的

Content: and which ones might be okay to drop.
Content_zh: 哪些也許可以放掉。

Content: And this is specifically for the date in two weeks from now, which is like pressing it to the disc for PC.
Content_zh: 這特別是針對兩週後那個日期，也就是要把 PC 版壓成光碟。

Content: So I guess it's, like, what are we gonna not feel comfortable having fixed before that disc is pressed.
Content_zh: 所以我想問題是，哪些東西如果在壓片前沒修好，我們會覺得不能接受。

Content: And how bad is the situation right now?
Content_zh: 現在情況有多糟？

Content: 'Cause I'm hearing things like the bugs aren't gonna be fixed
Content_zh: 因為我聽到有人說 bug 會來不及修完，

Content: by the ship date and all that.
Content_zh: 趕不上發行日之類的。

Content: I mean, from Vic's last email, it sounds like we're tracking about half the speed
Content_zh: 我是說，從 Vic 最後一封信看起來，我們修 bug 的速度大概只有

Content: um, that we would need to be for fixing these 250.
Content_zh: 要修完這 250 個所需速度的一半。

Content: Um, I guess it's just, like, what's the line we can draw where we're comfortable that it's a solid build
Content_zh: 嗯，我想就是要劃一條線，讓我們能放心說這是穩定的 build，

Content: that's not gonna crash that gives a good experience.
Content_zh: 不會當機，而且能提供好的體驗。

Content: And, yeah, maybe there's, like, some polish stuff that would have been nice to be in there
Content_zh: 而且，對，也許有些 polish 內容如果能放進去會很好，

Content: but at least it's in versions that get patched.
Content_zh: 但至少那些是在會更新的版本裡。

Content: Hansen: I mean, every game that ships ships with bugs, period.
Content_zh: Hansen：我是說，每款推出的遊戲都會帶著 bug，就這樣。

Content: They're--I mean, it's just unavoidable.
Content_zh: 我是說，這就是避免不了。

Content: You can keep testing a game forever.
Content_zh: 你可以永遠測一款遊戲。

Content: It's just you have to get to the point where you feel like
Content_zh: 只是你必須到一個程度，讓你覺得，

Content: you found things that are-- you know, that most people are likely to run into
Content_zh: 你已經找到大多數人可能會遇到的那些問題，

Content: and you've addressed all that stuff.
Content_zh: 並且把它們都處理掉了。

Content: Rice: Then, like, there's certain cut scenes when you interact with things
Content_zh: Rice：然後，像是有些過場動畫，你在旋轉模式下和東西互動時，

Content: in the spinning mode where she'll then just not be spinning
Content_zh: 她會突然不再旋轉，

Content: all of a sudden and talking, then it'll go back into
Content_zh: 開始說話，然後又回到

Content: spinning, like-- Schafer: I haven't seen that. Rice: You haven't seen that?
Content_zh: 旋轉狀態……Schafer：我沒看過。Rice：你沒看過？

Content: Schafer: Okay, we should find those. Rice: I just saw it, like, last night, so...
Content_zh: Schafer：好，我們應該找出那些。Rice：我昨晚才看到，所以……

Content: Crook: Oh, okay.
Content_zh: Crook：喔，好。

Content: Schafer: What stretching arms show?
Content_zh: Schafer：什麼伸長的手臂？

Content: Crook: When, the wakeup scene? Schafer: Mm-hm.
Content_zh: Crook：什麼時候，醒來那場嗎？Schafer：嗯哼。

Content: Crook: The arm--It happens twice, when it grabs him and then you can see at the very top,
Content_zh: Crook：手臂……它發生兩次，當它抓住了他，然後你可以看到最上面，

Content: you can see, like, the arms are all wacky.
Content_zh: 你可以看到，像，手臂都怪怪的。

Content: Like they're all stretched out and weird.
Content_zh: 像是全都被拉長，怪怪的。

Content: Schafer: Is it really ugly? Romero: Is that...?
Content_zh: Schafer：真的很醜嗎？Romero：那是……？

Content: Rice: I think I've seen it. It's like the top point is off the side and then where they come in.
Content_zh: Rice：我好像看過。像是最高點跑到旁邊，然後它們伸進來那裡。

Content: Schafer: If you were a player, would you say that's the science fiction, uh...
Content_zh: Schafer：如果你是玩家，你會覺得那是科幻，呃……

Content: Crook: It's a sliver of, like, pulled out stuff.
Content_zh: Crook：像是從裡面抽出來的一小片東西。

Content: Franzke: It is a potentially really risky fix, though, because touching-- Getting that camera to work right in that scene
Content_zh: Franzke：但那可能是風險很高的修法，因為一碰……要讓那場戲的鏡頭正常運作，

Content: was--we spent weeks-- Schafer: It's not just reposing the hand?
Content_zh: 我們之前花了好幾週……Schafer：不只是把手擺正嗎？

Content: Franzke: Right. And I really would not feel comfortable messing with the cameras unless we really have to because...
Content_zh: Franzke：對。除非真的非做不可，不然我不太敢動鏡頭，因為……

Content: Schafer: Would you fix it with the camera or fix it with the animation?
Content_zh: Schafer：你會用攝影機修好還是用動畫修好？

Content: Crook: We can try and change up the animation-- Schafer: But you can't just straighten up the arm.
Content_zh: Crook：我們可以試著改動畫……Schafer：但你不能只是把手臂拉直。

Content: Crook: That's a scary scene. Schafer: Hm.
Content_zh: Crook：那場戲很可怕。Schafer：嗯。

Content: Crook: We are trying to take things that maybe-- small things that we normally might ask
Content_zh: Crook：我們試著把一些平常可能會請 gameplay 程式設計師處理的小問題，

Content: the game play programmers to do, uh, we're trying to fix those things ourselves
Content_zh: 我們自己試著把那些東西修掉，

Content: just because they're so swamped.
Content_zh: 因為他們實在太忙了。

Content: But we're not programmers and we have to be careful.
Content_zh: 但我們不是程式設計師，所以得小心。

Content: We don't want to break things.
Content_zh: 我們不想把東西弄壞。

Content: So I'm kind of learning a lot of things.
Content_zh: 所以我也學到不少東西。

Content: Um, I'm learning a few things about game play programming.
Content_zh: 嗯，我學到一些 gameplay 程式設計相關的東西。

Content: Schafer: What if Ben Peck is super miserable at his new job? Has anyone called him lately?
Content_zh: Schafer：如果 Ben Peck 對他的新工作 過得很慘呢 最近有人打給他嗎？

Content: Crook: I saw--I saw him at GDC. He looked a little miserable.
Content_zh: Crook：我在 GDC 看到他了，他看起來有點慘。

Content: Schafer: Yeah, see what I'm saying? Crook: That was only 'cause Anna was giving him mean looks.
Content_zh: Schafer：看吧，懂我意思了吧？Crook：那只是因為 Anna 瞪他。

Content: Franzke: I saw him on Friday and he seemed relatively happy.
Content_zh: Franzke：我星期五看到他，他看起來還算開心。

Content: Schafer: Wait, can we see how many of these we have to go through?
Content_zh: Schafer：等等，我們能看看我們要經歷多少次嗎？

Content: Romero: Uh, so we're at 155.
Content_zh: Romero：嗯，所以我們在 155。

Content: The bottom goes all the way to 252.
Content_zh: 最下面一路到 252。

Content: So we're about a hundred away.
Content_zh: 所以還差大概一百個。

Content: Schafer: Oh, my God.
Content_zh: Schafer：天啊。

Content: Hansen: We don't have a lot of time in general, so yeah, in aggregate, all that stuff is a lot of work.
Content_zh: Hansen：整體來說，我們時間不多，所以全部加起來工作量很大。

Content: 'Cause what we're trying to do is, like, get to a point where we've addressed everything we're gonna address
Content_zh: 因為我們想做到的是，把該處理的都處理到一個段落，

Content: and then have the game sit without anybody working on it.
Content_zh: 然後讓遊戲在沒有人繼續動它的狀態下放著。

Content: Just--it's just sitting just in QA for, like, a week.
Content_zh: 就是讓它在 QA 裡放大概一週。

Content: And that's the hard part 'cause we-- we've already eaten into that week.
Content_zh: 難就難在，我們已經吃掉那一週的一部分了。

Content: And so we're kind of faced with the decision now of, like, do we just work up to the deadline
Content_zh: 所以我們現在面臨的決定是，要不要一路做到期限前，

Content: and just ship what we have?
Content_zh: 就直接把手上的東西推出去？

Content: And there's a huge risk involved with that.
Content_zh: 那風險非常大。

Content: But even, like, the small, minor polish bugs, it's like, you get enough of those
Content_zh: 但即使只是那些小小的 polish bug，累積起來也夠多了，

Content: and it does make a huge impact on the quality of the game.
Content_zh: 而且確實會大幅影響遊戲品質。

Content: Schafer: Yeah, it looks really bad.
Content_zh: Schafer：對，看起來會很糟。

Content: Um, when we print this disc, how would people get the patch?
Content_zh: 嗯，如果我們壓了這張光碟，玩家要怎麼拿到 patch？

Content: Franzke: Steam.
Content_zh: Franzke：Steam。

Content: Schafer: So that's the only way to get the patch for their disc-based version
Content_zh: Schafer：所以他們光碟版的遊戲

Content: of the game is by using Steam?
Content_zh: 只能用 Steam 拿到 patch？

Content: Franzke: Yeah. Schafer: They can't download it from our website or anything like that?
Content_zh: Franzke：是啊。Schafer：他們不能從我們的網站下載嗎？

Content: Franzke: Our infrastructure--like, we would require to have
Content_zh: Franzke：我們的基礎架構……像是我們需要有

Content: some kind of login service for people to register accounts.
Content_zh: 某種登入服務供人們登記帳戶。

Content: Schafer: That could be a huge consumer thing of them saying I need to--
Content_zh: Schafer：那可能會變成很大的消費者問題，他們會說我得……

Content: in order to get the patch, I need to join Steam, and I don't want to join Steam.
Content_zh: 為了拿到 patch，我得加入 Steam，但我不想加入 Steam。

Content: I bought this disc. Franzke: Yeah.
Content_zh: 我買了這張光碟。Franzke：對。

Content: Schafer: So it's not like in the old days, where a patch was just a bunch of LUA files
Content_zh: Schafer：所以這不像以前，patch 只是一堆 LUA 檔案，

Content: that you could just unpack into the directory of your game and it would fix it?
Content_zh: 可以直接解到遊戲目錄裡，就把問題修好了？

Content: Franzke: We could, but we have no infrastructure for that right now.
Content_zh: Franzke：可以，但我們現在沒有那套基礎架構。

Content: Schafer: On the server side or in the game?
Content_zh: Schafer：伺服器端，還是遊戲裡？

Content: In the game would have to have that kind of-- Franzke: We right now have no software to create an incremental patch.
Content_zh: 遊戲裡也得有那種……Franzke：我們現在沒有軟體可以建立增量更新檔。

Content: Schafer: People are gonna freak out.
Content_zh: Schafer：大家會嚇壞。

Content: Rice: Yeah, well, we don't want to have to support a whole 'nother platform.
Content_zh: Rice：對，可是我們不想再支援另一個平台。

Content: And, like, it would mean, like, building ground up an infrastructure
Content_zh: 而且那等於要從頭建立一套基礎架構，

Content: for them to be able to sign in to something.
Content_zh: 讓他們可以登入某個系統。

Content: For us to be able to host something, for us to support a whole 'nother platform.
Content_zh: 也讓我們能代管內容、支援另一個完整的平台。

Content: Schafer: Well, I just think the other stuff is-- like, just 'cause it's hard for us doesn't mean
Content_zh: Schafer：嗯，我只是覺得另一件事是……不能因為這對我們很難，

Content: we're not gonna have to deal with it as a company.
Content_zh: 不代表我們公司就不用處理它。

Content: You know what I mean? Like, as a huge community or PR problem.
Content_zh: 你懂我的意思嗎？它可能會變成大型社群或公關問題。

Content: Rice: This was a red flag waved as soon as we said we were gonna do a box copy.
Content_zh: Rice：我們一說要做盒裝版，這就是馬上亮起的紅旗。

Content: Franzke: Right, I mean, that's one of the first things we talked about is how the patching would work.
Content_zh: Franzke：對，我們最早討論的事情之一，就是 patch 要怎麼處理。

Content: Rice: Yeah, well, we can handle it case-by-case and give them a DRM free code whenever we have to
Content_zh: Rice：對，我們可以個案處理，需要的時候就給他們 GOG 或其他平台的 DRM-free 序號，

Content: for GOG or whatever if you think people care that much about DRM.
Content_zh: 如果你覺得大家真的那麼在乎 DRM 的話。

Content: Schafer: I mean, probably be they wouldn't notice all these things like a flicking shadow or something under the seat.
Content_zh: Schafer：我是說，他們大概不會注意到那些東西，像座位底下閃爍的影子之類。

Content: But it's just that people who buy DRM free copies of games are like, "I'm not signing on to anything.
Content_zh: 但問題是，買 DRM-free 遊戲的人會說：「我不想登入任何東西。

Content: I don't want to sign on to Steam." Rice: Right. Franzke: They hate--they hate Steam.
Content_zh: 我不想登入 Steam。」Rice：對。Franzke：他們討厭……他們討厭 Steam。

Content: Schafer: And they were loud about that until we made the DRM free version of the game,
Content_zh: Schafer：而且在我們做出第一款遊戲的 DRM-free 版本之前，

Content: the first game, so...
Content_zh: 他們一直很大聲，所以……

Content: And then what happens if we ship late to Nordic?
Content_zh: 那如果我們晚交給 Nordic 會怎樣？

Content: What does Nordic do if we ship late to them?
Content_zh: 如果我們晚交給 Nordic，Nordic 會怎麼辦？

Content: Rice: Uh, the disc is late, then all the dates shift.
Content_zh: Rice：呃，光碟晚了，所有日期就會跟著延。

Content: Schafer: And then what happens?
Content_zh: Schafer：然後呢？

Content: Rice: Then all the dates shift.
Content_zh: Rice：所有日期都會跟著延。

Content: Schafer: And then what happens.
Content_zh: Schafer：然後會發生什麼？

Content: Rice: Tell Sony and Justin's mad, and, yeah.
Content_zh: Rice：就得告訴 Sony，Justin 會生氣，對。
