Content: Rice: Yeah? I'm just trying to balance that out like how bad it would be if-- okay, anyway.
Content_zh: Rice：對吧？我只是想衡量一下，如果……好，總之。

Content: Maybe they wouldn't notice issues.
Content_zh: 也許他們不會注意到那些問題。

Content: Rice: This is why we never wanted to sim ship a disc.
Content_zh: Rice：這就是為什麼我們從來不想同步推出光碟版。

Content: This is why we wanted to, like, have the game out there,
Content_zh: 這就是為什麼我們想先讓遊戲推出去，

Content: have it be patched and finished before we did. So as soon as we signed a contract to sim ship,
Content_zh: 在做光碟前就先 patch 完、完成它。所以我們一簽下同步發行光碟的合約，

Content: we knew it would mean either finishing it all and having this period
Content_zh: 就知道這代表要嘛全部做完，並留出這段時間，

Content: or having a build on a disc that wasn't fully patched.
Content_zh: 要嘛就是光碟上的 build 沒有完全 patch 好。

Content: Schafer: Say we slipped the disc date by two weeks.
Content_zh: Schafer：假設我們把光碟日期延後兩週。

Content: Does that mean moving that revenue out of the plan for two weeks is Justin's problem
Content_zh: 這是說把那筆收入從計畫裡往後挪兩週，會變成 Justin 的問題，

Content: or that there's something bigger with Nordic where they have a truck idling
Content_zh: 還是 Nordic 那邊有更大的問題，比如有一輛卡車

Content: in the loading dock for two weeks?
Content_zh: 得在裝貨區乾等兩週？

Content: Rice: It's that. They want us to right now announce a date.
Content_zh: Rice：是後者。他們要我們現在宣布日期。

Content: And Sony wants us to commit to a date.
Content_zh: Sony 要我們承諾日期。

Content: Everyone wants us to commit to a date.
Content_zh: 大家都要我們承諾日期。

Content: We've been holding it off because of all these moving pieces.
Content_zh: 因為這些變動因素，我們一直拖著。

Content: Schafer: But it sounds like we already are committed to a date if we're saying we can't slip it.
Content_zh: Schafer：但如果我們說不能延，好像就代表我們其實已經承諾日期了。

Content: Rice: We haven't totally, but we should and that's what he wants to know.
Content_zh: Rice：還沒有完全承諾，但我們應該承諾，這也是他想知道的。

Content: Schafer: Why don't we just move it two weeks and then commit to it?
Content_zh: Schafer：那我們為什麼不直接往後移兩週，然後承諾那個日期？

Content: Rice: 'Cause I don't know that Justin can.
Content_zh: Rice：因為我不知道 Justin 能不能接受。

Content: They've been talking-- so there's, like, million pieces in place.
Content_zh: 他們一直在談……所以已經有很多環節卡好了。

Content: Schafer: Like, these are all the ones we know about.
Content_zh: Schafer：像這些都是我們知道的部分。

Content: I'm talking about there's a bug that we ship on the disc that is, like every--
Content_zh: 我是說，如果我們把某個 bug 壓進光碟版，像是每個……

Content: it's like the elevator, Manny locked in the elevator bug.
Content_zh: 就像電梯那個，Manny 被鎖在電梯裡的 bug。

Content: Rice: Okay. Schafer: Everyone's posting vines about it all over, it's all over Twitter the next day.
Content_zh: Rice：好。Schafer：隔天大家都在 Twitter 上到處發它的 Vine，

Content: And everyone's like, everyone's freaking out about this bug.
Content_zh: 所有人都在為這個 bug 抓狂。

Content: Say I can't this patch 'cause I bought the disc, or I was dumb enough to buy the disc version.
Content_zh: 比如說「我沒辦法 patch，因為我買的是光碟版」，或「我蠢到買了光碟版」。

Content: You know, and it's just like we're ripping off everybody and that's the story.
Content_zh: 你知道，就會變成「我們坑了所有人」，然後故事就變成這樣。

Content: And if it's that on one hand or slipping the date by two weeks, I would slip the date by two weeks.
Content_zh: 如果一邊是這樣，另一邊是把日期延後兩週，那我會選擇延後兩週。

Content: But I want to know what's the consequence of that?
Content_zh: 但我想知道後果是什麼？

Content: Rice: Yeah, we'll talk about it after.
Content_zh: Rice：是的，我們再談吧。

Content: Schafer: Yeah.
Content_zh: Schafer：是啊。

Content: Romero: Uh, all right, almost to the forest.
Content_zh: Romero：呃，好，快到森林那段了。

Content: Let's see.
Content_zh: 我看看。

Content: Rice: That was the first thing I thought when we had that conversation.
Content_zh: Rice：那是我們當初談到這件事時，我第一個想到的。

Content: I was like, oh, is there wiggle room in their production schedule
Content_zh: 我當時想，他們的製作時程裡，

Content: for, uh, the box?
Content_zh: 盒裝這邊還有沒有一點彈性？

Content: And I looked, and no, their drop dead is, like, the 24th.
Content_zh: 我一看，沒有，他們的硬期限大概是 24 號。

Content: And that's why they wanted it on the 20th so they could, like, prepare everything.
Content_zh: 所以他們才想要 20 號拿到，這樣才能準備好所有東西。

Content: Uh, so it would mean pushing the box date out, which I think, since it would be our fault for delivering a build later
Content_zh: 呃，所以這代表要把盒裝日期往後推，而我覺得，既然是我們比較晚交 build，

Content: that we'd have to push everything.
Content_zh: 我們就得把所有事情都往後推。

Content: 'Cause I think, like, if we delivered the build on time and they were the reason that the box showed up late,

Content: This is really a lot of programming, and especially release engineering
Content_zh: 很多程式工作，尤其是 release engineering，

Content: is just sitting around waiting for files to be copied and for certain operations to be performed on files,
Content_zh: 其實就是坐著等檔案複製，等某些檔案操作完成，

Content: which is just kind of weird, like one would expect that, you know, shipping a game is, like,
Content_zh: 這有點奇怪，因為大家可能會以為推出一款遊戲是，像是，

Content: super exciting kind of stuff.
Content_zh: 超刺激的事。

Content: But really, in the end of a day, it's a lot of copying files from A to B
Content_zh: 但說到底，其實就是把很多檔案從 A 複製到 B，

Content: and sitting around waiting for those files to be copied.
Content_zh: 然後坐著等那些檔案複製完。

Content: Um, all right. So now we essentially have, like, all the yellow exclamation marks are gone,
Content_zh: 嗯，好。所以現在基本上所有黃色驚嘆號都消失了，

Content: which means we now have a list of files, all the files that were changed.
Content_zh: 也就是說我們現在有一份檔案清單，列出所有變更過的檔案。

Content: And I'm just gonna say, okay, I want to commit these into the release kind of branch,
Content_zh: 然後我會說，好，我要把這些提交到 release 分支，

Content: so I'm gonna say integration from main.
Content_zh: 所以我要說從 main 整合。

Content: And this is actually also lock down, so I'm gonna say content lock.
Content_zh: 這其實也是 lock down，所以我要說 content lock。

Content: Oh, I actually have to spell it correctly.
Content_zh: 喔，我其實得拼對。

Content: And then I say submit, and that's essentially it.
Content_zh: 然後我按 submit，基本上就這樣。

Content: So now we grab all the files from the main line and copy them over into the release candidate branch,
Content_zh: 所以現在我們把 mainline 的所有檔案抓過來，複製到 release candidate 分支，

Content: and we lock down the build.
Content_zh: 然後我們把 build 鎖定。

Content: Rice: Right now all the, uh, disc stuff is basically off to Nordic and on their plate,
Content_zh: Rice：現在所有，呃，光碟相關的東西基本上都交給 Nordic，輪到他們處理了，

Content: so that should actually go into manufacturing this week.
Content_zh: 所以這週應該就會進入製造。

Content: And they said they said they're gonna talk with us for photos
Content_zh: 他們說會跟我們討論照片，

Content: and gonna update as they go along.
Content_zh: 也會隨著進度更新我們。

Content: But this should be tracking towards same day launching the disc as the game digitally.
Content_zh: 但目前看起來實體光碟應該會和數位版同日推出。

Content: Schafer: I know what you're saying, why are you wearing luau clothes, Tim?
Content_zh: Schafer：我知道你們想問，Tim，你為什麼穿夏威夷派對服？

Content: -Yeah. Rice: Why are you wearing-- -No, it's pretty normal.
Content_zh: -對。Rice：你為什麼穿…… -沒有，這很正常。

Content: Schafer: I am wearing both pants and luau pants because tonight we are going to have a bonfire down at the beach
Content_zh: Schafer：我穿了褲子，也穿了夏威夷派對褲，因為今晚我們要去海灘辦營火，

Content: to celebrate the completion of Broken Age, everybody.
Content_zh: 慶祝《Broken Age》完成，各位。

Content: [Applause] Yay!
Content_zh: [掌聲] 耶！

Content: He's like, son of a-- about fucking time!
Content_zh: 他就像，媽的……總算到了！

Content: Yes, okay.
Content_zh: 對，好。

Content: It's just about done, right, Oliver?
Content_zh: 就快好了，對吧，Oliver？

Content: No way it could ever bounce out of cert now?
Content_zh: 現在不可能被認證打回票了吧？

Content: You only have time to eat now during meetings.
Content_zh: 你現在只剩開會時有時間吃飯了。

Content: Yeah! Yes!
Content_zh: 耶！對！

Content: [Music]
Content_zh: [音樂]
